Friend,

**The Democrats have been in charge of Congress for over six months now, and this is what we’ve learned:** **1\. Open borders = security crisis
2\. Defunding the police = violent crime tearing our families apart
3\. Shutting down America = hurting our kids’ education
4\. Democrat agenda = Socialism **

name: John Fetterman
subject: A beautiful 30-by-40 foot pool
disclaimer_text: paid for by taxpayers
body:
This is NOT my official residence.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210725-2083-header&t=1&akid=2083%2E434096%2ES9PGju)
The pool at the former Lieutenant Governor’s residence is officially open!
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/23973?refcode=em20210725-2083&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2083%2E434096%2ES9PGju)
Now let me be very clear, Peter. This is NOT my actual residence. I am the only Lieutenant Governor in the history of Pennsylvania to *reject* living in a huge estate with a chef, gardener, and pool paid for by taxpayers. And in late 2019 the Commonwealth divested itself of the property, saving taxpayers as much as $400,000 every year.
Pennsylvania does not owe me or my family a staffed mansion to live in. The supreme honor and privilege of serving as LG is many, many multiples more than enough.
Gisele and I chose to raise our kids and keep our residence, an old car dealership across the street from Andrew Carnegie’s first steel mill in Braddock, instead.**Still, we have always maintained that if *our* children were welcome to swim in that beautiful 30-by-40 foot pool, so should every other child...**
[****](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/23973?refcode=em20210725-2083&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2083%2E434096%2ES9PGju)
...So in June 2019, we opened up the pool to the children of Pennsylvania! 😎
Now the pool gets put to good use every summer by public groups and nonprofits. Children with little to no access to a swimming pool can now learn how to swim in a beautiful pool at a historic estate.
The ugly truth is that swimming has a painful legacy of racial segregation. Gisele and I are committed to equity in all spaces. It is our hope that making this pool available to everyone will help end that disparity and allow every kid in Pennsylvania to have a fun + cool summer.
**Equity everywhere is worth fighting for, Peter. And I *promise* that as a United States Senator, I will fight for equity in your community as if it were my very own.**
In order to build the kind of winning campaign that will get us there, we need to raise a lot of money. A big part of that is people like you chipping in. With our July fundraising deadline just around the corner, I have to ask:
[**_Will you please make your first donation to our campaign right now? Every dollar helps send me to the U.S. Senate where I’ll fight like hell for your community just like I fight for mine._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/23973?refcode=em20210725-2083&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2083%2E434096%2ES9PGju)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/23973?refcode=em20210725-2083&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2083%2E434096%2ES9PGju)**
Here’s to another great summer,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210725-2083-footer&t=24&refcode2=2083_434096_S9PGju&akid=2083%2E434096%2ES9PGju)**
---

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2083%2E434096%2ES9PGju)

name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: Behind the Scenes: Going to the Olympics with Ivanka
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:
I had the honor of attending the Winter Olympics in South Korea as a member of the official American delegation led by Ivanka Trump. I had dreamed of Peter,

_This is the next email in our series that makes sure you get an authentic, behind the scenes look at my time in the White House and now on the campaign trail - straight from me and my team._ _\---_ Attending the Olympics was a dream come true, especially as part of the official delegation representing our country. It was incredible to meet so many of the athletes representing our country, so now it makes me sad to see people using these Olympic Games as a platform to bash America. Millions of people all over the world would do just about anything to be an American, a privilege many of us all too often take for granted. As the American flag waves proudly, it is a reminder for all to respect the sacrifice made by our brave soldiers to protect our freedoms. I am proud to cheer on Team USA! In February 2018, I had the honor of attending the Winter Olympics in South Korea as a member of the official American delegation led by Ivanka Trump. I had dreamed of going to the Olympics since I was a kid. I love America and I love sports—so really what could be better? When Ivanka invited me to be part of the US delegation, at first, I thought she must be kidding, but she told me it was already done, and I had been cleared to go. I couldn’t have been more excited. I knew this trip was more than just the Olympics—the escalating conflict with North Korea would play a major role. The team from the White House included Ivanka, her chief of staff, Julie Radford, a fellow mom to three young kids and close confidante; senior advisor to General McMaster and the NSC staff Sarah Flaherty; and NSC Korean specialist Allison Hooker. The incoming chairman of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee Jim Risch (R-ID) also joined our delegation. As our delegation landed in South Korea, the administration announced the toughest sanctions ever against North Korea. We knew our job had just gotten more difficult. Our first stop was all business. Ivanka, and the other members of the delegation, including Senator Risch; General Vincent Brooks, the commander of United States Forces Korea; Mark Knapper, the Chargé d’Affaires for South Korea; and I had a small private dinner at the Blue House with President Moon, his wife, and Kang Kyung-wha, the South Korean foreign minister. Tonight was different because Ivanka was the principal, and was expected to carry the water not just for her father, but for the country. Her hard work paid off. She was engaging and knew personal details about our dinner hosts that kept the conversation moving and interesting. She managed to find common interests to discuss, even getting the South Korean first lady to open up and throw her head back in laughter at one point. It was impressive. The South Korean first lady as well as Olympic gold medalist Angela Ruggiero joined us the next day to watch Team USA men compete in snowboarding, bobsledding, and curling. We had a blast cheering on our Olympians. I never thought I could get so excited about curling, but the atmosphere was electric and the crowd, including our delegation, went crazy when Team USA defeated Sweden 10–7 to win the gold. Our time at the games closed hanging out and taking photos with the internationally acclaimed K-pop group EXO, who had performed at the ceremonies. It was quite the contrast: one minute we had been discussing how to engage with one of the world’s most evil regimes and the next we were snapping pics with a Korean boy band. Just hours before the closing ceremony began, South Korean president Moon met with North Korean general Kim Yong-chol. Moon had announced following their meeting that the North Koreans were open to talks with the United States. This announcement came just three days after President Trump issued the largest sanctions ever against North Korea. Near the conclusion of the Winter Olympics from South Korea I announced: President Donald J. Trump’s Administration is committed to achieving the complete, verifiable, and irreversible denuclearization of the Korean Peninsula. The United States, our Olympic Host the Republic of Korea, and the international community broadly agree that denuclearization must be the result of any dialogue with North Korea. The maximum pressure campaign must continue until North Korea denuclearizes. Weeks later, North Korea indicated they were open to direct talks with President Trump about denuclearization, and they’d be willing to suspend nuclear and missile tests, a huge win for the administration. Thank you for reading, Sarah |

clean_body: I had the honor of attending the Winter Olympics in South Korea as a member of the official American delegation led by Ivanka Trump. I had dreamed of Peter, This is the next email in our series that makes sure you get an authentic, behind the scenes look at my time in the White House and now on the campaign trail - straight from me and my team. \--- Attending the Olympics was a dream come true, especially as part of the official delegation representing our country. It was incredible to meet so many of the athletes representing our country, so now it makes me sad to see people using these Olympic Games as a platform to bash America. Millions of people all over the world would do just about anything to be an American, a privilege many of us all too often take for granted. As the American flag waves proudly, it is a reminder for all to respect the sacrifice made by our brave soldiers to protect our freedoms. I am proud to cheer on Team USA! In February 2018, I had the honor of attending the Winter Olympics in South Korea as a member of the official American delegation led by Ivanka Trump. I had dreamed of going to the Olympics since I was a kid. I love America and I love sports—so really what could be better? When Ivanka invited me to be part of the US delegation, at first, I thought she must be kidding, but she told me it was already done, and I had been cleared to go. I couldn’t have been more excited. I knew this trip was more than just the Olympics—the escalating conflict with North Korea would play a major role. The team from the White House included Ivanka, her chief of staff, Julie Radford, a fellow mom to three young kids and close confidante; senior advisor to General McMaster and the NSC staff Sarah Flaherty; and NSC Korean specialist Allison Hooker. The incoming chairman of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee Jim Risch (R-ID) also joined our delegation. As our delegation landed in South Korea, the administration announced the toughest sanctions ever against North Korea. We knew our job had just gotten more difficult. Our first stop was all business. Ivanka, and the other members of the delegation, including Senator Risch; General Vincent Brooks, the commander of United States Forces Korea; Mark Knapper, the Chargé d’Affaires for South Korea; and I had a small private dinner at the Blue House with President Moon, his wife, and Kang Kyung-wha, the South Korean foreign minister. Tonight was different because Ivanka was the principal, and was expected to carry the water not just for her father, but for the country. Her hard work paid off. She was engaging and knew personal details about our dinner hosts that kept the conversation moving and interesting. She managed to find common interests to discuss, even getting the South Korean first lady to open up and throw her head back in laughter at one point. It was impressive. The South Korean first lady as well as Olympic gold medalist Angela Ruggiero joined us the next day to watch Team USA men compete in snowboarding, bobsledding, and curling. We had a blast cheering on our Olympians. I never thought I could get so excited about curling, but the atmosphere was electric and the crowd, including our delegation, went crazy when Team USA defeated Sweden 10–7 to win the gold. Our time at the games closed hanging out and taking photos with the internationally acclaimed K-pop group EXO, who had performed at the ceremonies. It was quite the contrast: one minute we had been discussing how to engage with one of the world’s most evil regimes and the next we were snapping pics with a Korean boy band. Just hours before the closing ceremony began, South Korean president Moon met with North Korean general Kim Yong-chol. Moon had announced following their meeting that the North Koreans were open to talks with the United States. This announcement came just three days after President Trump issued the largest sanctions ever against North Korea. Near the conclusion of the Winter Olympics from South Korea I announced: President Donald J. Trump’s Administration is committed to achieving the complete, verifiable, and irreversible denuclearization of the Korean Peninsula. The United States, our Olympic Host the Republic of Korea, and the international community broadly agree that denuclearization must be the result of any dialogue with North Korea. The maximum pressure campaign must continue until North Korea denuclearizes. Weeks later, North Korea indicated they were open to direct talks with President Trump about denuclearization, and they’d be willing to suspend nuclear and missile tests, a huge win for the administration. On May 11th, Dr. Fauci lied to our faces.

He came to the Senate and told us that the NIH absolutely did not fund gain of function research.

That simply isn't true and I gave Dr. Fauci the chance to retract his statements in our Senate hearing today.

No surprise, he stood by his lies.

_I'm doing everything to prove him wrong. _

I'm leading the charge to #FIREFAUCI and hold him accountable for lying to Congress, misleading the public, and for his well-documented role in providing funds to the Wuhan Lab in China so they can create bioweapons like COVID-19.

Dr. Fauci has proven time and time again that he has no idea what he's doing.

He's not an expert in COVID. He's an expert in political theater!

You can see that every time he's in front of the microphone.

* He still says he doesn't know the role China played in the pandemic.

* He claims to "trusts the science" but repeatedly denies it in favor of theatrics and dramatic attacks.

He dances around it, but we know the truth. We've seen the documents. We've read the emails. We've watched the COVID hysteria unfold over the past 18 months.

Not only was he flat-out wrong about the virus, but he's also continuously lied to the American public and demonstrated poor judgment.

ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. It's time for Fauci TO GO.

Will you join my fight by chipping in now? By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution: If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically. Dr. Fauci has proven time and time again that he has no idea what he's doing. He's not an expert in COVID. He's an expert in political theater! You can see that every time he's in front of the microphone. He still says he doesn't know the role China played in the pandemic. He denies he supported gain of function research despite the paper trail that proves he did. He claims to "trusts the science" but repeatedly denies it in favor of theatrics and dramatic attacks. He dances around it, but we know the truth. We've seen the documents. We've read the emails. We've watched the COVID hysteria unfold over the past 18 months. Not only was he flat-out wrong about the virus, but he's also continuously lied to the American public and demonstrated poor judgment. ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. It's time for Fauci TO GO. That's why I'm putting my foot down and if you agree I hope you'll chip in now: I have been fighting to dismiss Fauci for a while now, but I know more than ever I can't do it alone. name: Dr. Ben Carson, American Cornerstone Institute
subject: I’m asking for your support
body:
Peter,
You've heard me talk about the American
Cornerstone Institute before, but I wanted to give you an update
on everything that we have been doing. We have been staying quite
busy trying to educate America about the far left's radical
social agenda and unprecedented raiding of the treasury to
support liberal causes and interest groups.
Far left progressives are doing everything
they can to fool the American public into thinking that their
radical views are actually mainstream, including shouting
"Racist!" in response to anything that is even remotely
conservative. How can we get back to common ground if they are
unwilling to even engage in a debate? That cannot be the way
forward, and the American Cornerstone Institute is doing
everything it can to reinvigorate the principles that made
America the greatest country in the history of the world.
I'm asked about the same thing every time I
go on the news. I'm asked about how our nation got so divided and
what can be done to fix it. It's a question I love answering
because, like you, I believe that America's best days are still
in front of it. The American Cornerstone Institute has some
exciting and innovative solutions to get us back to our founding
principles.
We've already been able to do so much because
of the support we have received so far. We've produced papers,
op-eds, analyses, have been all across the country, and have
spoken with members of Congress about how important it is to
return America to its former greatness.
With your support we would be able to do so
much more. Perhaps the biggest threat to the next several
generations of Americans is the teaching of Critical Race Theory,
commonly known as CRT. This would teach children, at taxpayer
funded schools, to hate America and the ideas it was founded on.
It will teach students to hate their fellow Americas based only
on the color of their skin. In effect, generations of Americans
would be taught to hate America in the classroom. This is being
fought tooth and nail on a local level, and there is some
progress being made.
American Cornerstone Institute stands with
America in this fight. We are working hard to launch our Little
Patriots program which would equip students, parents, and
teachers with the resources and knowledge they need to combat
this radical curriculum. We want to get our program in as many
places as possible.
I personally hate asking for money, but I
hate losing our country even more. So please join our cause and
donate. Together we are unbeatable.
We are unlike a lot of think tanks. We don't
just talk about what should be done, we come up with solutions
and try to put them in to practice. That's all because of you. We
are able to do such much because of what you have given to us,
and we can't thank you enough for your support.
Thank you for everything you have done for
us.

Sincerely,
Ben Carson
Founder, American Cornerstone Institute

name: Latinos for Trump
subject: Latinos for Trump July News
body:
Hello, Patriots! ReAwaken America in Anaheim CA Our President just returned from Anaheim, CA where she spoke in front of over 2500 patriots at Influ
| |

[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=391060.2281.1.368de22b3ef4935575b3023a6fab3b38) |
---
# Hello, Patriots!
---
|
---
**ReAwaken America in Anaheim CA**
Our President just returned from Anaheim, CA where she spoke in front of over 2500 patriots at Influence Church. She was among General Flynn, Mike Lindell, Patrick Byrne and many other great American Patriots! Our President has been added to the tour with 3 remaining cities. Get YOUR tickets at
https://www.thrivetimeshow.com/reawaken-america-tour/
Use the LFAF code to receive your 10% discount. Only 48% tickets left!
View our President at:
https://rumble.com/vk6nnk-bianca-gracia-latinas-for-trump.html
---
Our Faith Based Director Rolando Rodriguez and North Texas Ambassador Sheena Rodriguez coordinated VIVA CUBA LIBRE events across Texas this week to show that we stand for Freedom and Liberty, We stand with the People of Cuba and We STAND AGAINST COMMUNISM!
---
| |
---
---
---
---
---
Our State Director Mayra Gutierrez and grassroot activist Simon Garza have been out blocking walking to re-elect Mayor Richard Molina in Edinburg, TX
---
| |
---
---
---
|
---
Our Communication team was out in California at a Women's leadership conference learning about saving California. Great Job Cynthia Kaui!
---
**This week our President Bianca Gracia testified at the Texas Capitol on behalf of securing and closing the border!**
---
| |
---
---
---
|
---
This July we sponsored a table at CPAC. We met so may patriots, connected with old friends, and registered many new members. We held a private meeting with Candidate for Governor of Texas Don Huffines and met with many other candidates from across the country.
All of our leaders made their presence know by interviewing with Fox News, OAN, Newsmax, and many other radio and podcast. Let's just say we made our presence known for ALL of YOU!
| |
---
---
---
---
---
Our Florida Team, VP Ozzy, Chief of Staff Enrique, Sergeant of Arms Adolfo Dominguez, and Marketing Director Kelly always representing in Florida from making their presence at the Florida Trump Rally to supporting our Florida Federated Women!
---
| |
---
---
---
|
---
**Hannity & Trump Town Hall in Edinburg TX**
Patriots, we showed up in Edinburg Tx to show our love and support for President Trump. We believe it was important to show that the grassroots is alive and well! So many coalitions came together to drive around South Texas in support of Trump! We attended the town hall and our President Bianca Gracia met with many of the elected officials to discuss the future of America, Texas, and our Hispanic communities!
| |
---
---
---
---
---
|
---
**Red, White, and Blue Bus Tour**
July 4th weekend was full of patriotism around the country. Our President travelled to Sturgis, SD to kick off the Red, White, and Blue bus tour featuring our Latinos for America First PAC. The event was phenomenal and we must share that America is still Alive and worth fighting for....
| |
---
---
|
---
Meanwhile in Corpus Christi, TX our South Texas Director and Vice President held a patriotic Boat Parade full of God loving American patriots!
Job Well Done!
---
| |
---
---
To keep our team active and on the move from the East Coast to the West Coast donate today! Help us Save America for the future of our children!
---

name: Chief James Craig
subject: I know why Detroit didn’t burn, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58009601:JnA1Y9lFN:m:1:3253819041:2570D251E3062C12AE08E575C17650FC:r) | |
---
Peter,

Last summer, Portland burned. Seattle, Minneapolis, Atlanta. Even some cities in Michigan...

But not Detroit.

Why?

**I'm Chief James Craig, former Detroit Police Chief - and I know why Detroit didn't burn.**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58009601:JnA1Y9lFN:m:1:3253819041:2570D251E3062C12AE08E575C17650FC:r)

[**WATCH A SPECIAL MESSAGE FROM CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58009601:JnA1Y9lFN:m:1:3253819041:2570D251E3062C12AE08E575C17650FC:r)
See, I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs.

I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened.

The police retreated, and let their city burn.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

But there's more to the "why?" than that.

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city.

I was the first in that day, leading from the front.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58009601:JnA1Y9lFN:m:1:3253819041:2570D251E3062C12AE08E575C17650FC:r)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, _**Detroit did not burn.**_

That's the why.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**So, I'm opening an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. **

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead From the Front donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of our team from the beginning.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58009601:JnA1Y9lFN:m:1:3253819041:2570D251E3062C12AE08E575C17650FC:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58009601:JnA1Y9lFN:m:1:3253819041:2570D251E3062C12AE08E575C17650FC:r)

[**DONATE NOW
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58009601:JnA1Y9lFN:m:1:3253819041:2570D251E3062C12AE08E575C17650FC:r)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

_**And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!"**_

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front, rather than ruling us like a queen.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58009601:JnA1Y9lFN:m:1:3253819041:2570D251E3062C12AE08E575C17650FC:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58009602:JnA1Y9lFN:m:1:3253819041:2570D251E3062C12AE08E575C17650FC:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58009603:JnA1Y9lFN:m:1:3253819041:2570D251E3062C12AE08E575C17650FC:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58009604:JnA1Y9lFN:m:1:3253819041:2570D251E3062C12AE08E575C17650FC:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58009605:JnA1Y9lFN:m:1:3253819041:2570D251E3062C12AE08E575C17650FC:r)
_**If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically.**_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58009601:JnA1Y9lFN:m:1:3253819041:2570D251E3062C12AE08E575C17650FC:r)

Chief James Craig

Former Detroit Police Chief

P.S. I'm not a politician, I'm a police officer. I'm starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated: **[https://secure.winred.com/james-craig-for-governor-exploratory-committee/action-166204](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58009601:JnA1Y9lFN:m:1:3253819041:2570D251E3062C12AE08E575C17650FC:r)**

---

Individual contributors may donate up to the maximum of $7,150 during an election cycle.

subject: I Saw Biden’s Border Crisis Firsthand...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ORM3nwWEQgQgMM1cz-laIt5z1LGDPCFS2B5Agg2Wfzo3Gm81mqN2lIh6uQa0-bO6LyBs_JeL8shKYabYQDXoYKVQPp7zXttV6mlzF2YnsKkr22Qttryg-iMSvXxdm6sfbzl0zQ_xdDP9mqqEbPjy_XbzdGxcYXPeSfwPBXbySzL8WxODjR-JeoZDin74cJPEogSwb2qRf7U=&c=OPCleqyjlvWDKWPdyMnID-9AZ5sXV0KhXS8xcbk8MydhPynFdUOjpQ==&ch=o4N1HODuiJ0gWT1L7dC10xD2L0Q7GubkhDX6EJjvz0n0uIc1G24PXQ==)
---
| Peter,
I recently toured the southern border to see Biden's crisis up close and in person.
After seeing the situation on the ground firsthand, it is now apparent that under Joe Biden's administration, the DHS has ceased cooperating with local law enforcement agencies in deporting criminal illegal aliens. We've gone from building Trump's Border Wall to releasing dangerous illegal immigrants right into our communities!
That's why I'm urging an immediate investigation into the Biden Administration's blatant refusal to enforce our existing immigration laws. If they want to subvert our Rule of Law in order to usher in a radical open borders scheme, they better be prepared to answer for it in front of the American people!
[You can help me hold the Biden Administration accountable by chipping in at this link >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ORM3nwWEQgQgMM1cz-laIt5z1LGDPCFS2B5Agg2Wfzo3Gm81mqN2lIh6uQa0-bO6LyBs_JeL8shKYabYQDXoYKVQPp7zXttV6mlzF2YnsKkr22Qttryg-iMSvXxdm6sfbzl0zQ_xdDP9mqqEbPjy_XbzdGxcYXPeSfwPBXbySzL8WxODjR-JeoZDin74cJPEogSwb2qRf7U=&c=OPCleqyjlvWDKWPdyMnID-9AZ5sXV0KhXS8xcbk8MydhPynFdUOjpQ==&ch=o4N1HODuiJ0gWT1L7dC10xD2L0Q7GubkhDX6EJjvz0n0uIc1G24PXQ==)
I'm doing everything I can to light a fire under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, but they are still ignoring this massive national security threat.

| Unlike some who refuse to take action to put the country first - even as violent foreign criminals are released into America's interior - I'm using my time in the Swamp to take action against Biden's Open Borders!
I'd be grateful if you helped me put America First today. [The Left wants to reshape the country and ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ORM3nwWEQgQgMM1cz-laIt5z1LGDPCFS2B5Agg2Wfzo3Gm81mqN2lIh6uQa0-bO6LyBs_JeL8shKYabYQDXoYKVQPp7zXttV6mlzF2YnsKkr22Qttryg-iMSvXxdm6sfbzl0zQ_xdDP9mqqEbPjy_XbzdGxcYXPeSfwPBXbySzL8WxODjR-JeoZDin74cJPEogSwb2qRf7U=&c=OPCleqyjlvWDKWPdyMnID-9AZ5sXV0KhXS8xcbk8MydhPynFdUOjpQ==&ch=o4N1HODuiJ0gWT1L7dC10xD2L0Q7GubkhDX6EJjvz0n0uIc1G24PXQ==)[endanger us](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ORM3nwWEQgQgMM1cz-laIt5z1LGDPCFS2B5Agg2Wfzo3Gm81mqN2lIh6uQa0-bO6LyBs_JeL8shKYabYQDXoYKVQPp7zXttV6mlzF2YnsKkr22Qttryg-iMSvXxdm6sfbzl0zQ_xdDP9mqqEbPjy_XbzdGxcYXPeSfwPBXbySzL8WxODjR-JeoZDin74cJPEogSwb2qRf7U=&c=OPCleqyjlvWDKWPdyMnID-9AZ5sXV0KhXS8xcbk8MydhPynFdUOjpQ==&ch=o4N1HODuiJ0gWT1L7dC10xD2L0Q7GubkhDX6EJjvz0n0uIc1G24PXQ==)[ in the process - but we can fight back!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ORM3nwWEQgQgMM1cz-laIt5z1LGDPCFS2B5Agg2Wfzo3Gm81mqN2lIh6uQa0-bO6LyBs_JeL8shKYabYQDXoYKVQPp7zXttV6mlzF2YnsKkr22Qttryg-iMSvXxdm6sfbzl0zQ_xdDP9mqqEbPjy_XbzdGxcYXPeSfwPBXbySzL8WxODjR-JeoZDin74cJPEogSwb2qRf7U=&c=OPCleqyjlvWDKWPdyMnID-9AZ5sXV0KhXS8xcbk8MydhPynFdUOjpQ==&ch=o4N1HODuiJ0gWT1L7dC10xD2L0Q7GubkhDX6EJjvz0n0uIc1G24PXQ==)

Cawthorn is actively working against public health experts and endangering everyone in Western North Carolina -- but sadly, this disregard for his duty is nothing new.
There is something surprising here, though \-- it seems like Cawthorn has forgotten that going door-to-door is an incredibly effective way to reach people, and is a cornerstone of winning campaigns.
**Jasmine and our team were out knocking doors last weekend in Hendersonville, and now we’re getting ready for our August 14 Day of Action, where we’ll be knocking across the district. This is exactly how we’re going to win.**
We’re building the biggest grassroots organizing campaign that Western North Carolina has ever seen. We’re going to knock thousands of doors and let everyone know how deeply Madison Cawthorn has let us down -- and that Jasmine is offering a better way forward for all of us.
So please, Peter -- think about what a door-to-door campaign could be used for. Saving lives by helping people get vaccinated. _And, unseating Madison Cawthorn and finally electing a Congresswoman who will protect our health and wellbeing._

| Friend,

The Biden Administration opened America's borders in the middle of a pandemic and a crisis ensued. They kept the borders open despite an enormous surge of immigrants crossing illegally. Biden even halted the construction of the wall, which emboldened the cartels and smugglers to expand their operations.
We have seen record-breaking month after record-breaking month of border crossings, and there doesn't seem to be any sign of stopping. Kat wants to know: do you approve or disapprove of Biden's handling of the Border?
Take the poll by clicking below!

body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BGhhfw&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=ECyDFGS&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/5e30cdc6-e34f-4b74-b295-48f8edc5260f.png]

The Democrats know they break laws, they do it anyway because weak Republicans don't hold them accountable.

The Democrat party loves rewarding people who break our laws and enter our country illegally. They'll give these lawbreakers pathways to citizenship and money through programs like DACA. The left will do whatever they can to secure Democrat voters. Obama even acknowledged that constitutionally [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SiJ6H7&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=ECvbC9L&]he didn't have the ability to bypass Congress and yet in 2012 that's what Obama did.

A federal judge rules against DACA.

On July 16th, 2021 Judge Andrew Hanen from Texas ruled that the DACA program was unconstitutionally implemented and blocked the federal government [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SiJ6PZ&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EwPTICM&]from allowing new applicants. This of course angered the leftists and the Biden Administration are now putting into place talks of how to work amnesty into the senate budget that's authored by Bernie Sanders.

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/efe8ef27-49d9-43c4-b044-c2bdad16124f.jpg]

Does Dan Newhouse push back against the open border and destruction of our nation's safety?

The answer is no, Dan Newhouse doesn't push back. Instead,he co-sponsored a bill [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SiJ68z&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EM4pwA4&]that would grant a newimmigration status and also voted with the Democrats in Congress for their "American Dream and Promise Act 2021." [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SiJ6ju&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=E9n1QEk&]Are you kidding me?

Dan Newhouse has shown that he will not put America first, or protect the immigrants who came here legally to obtain their American citizenship. Dan Newhouse will throw in his vote with the leftist and their communist agenda. His vote is supposed to represent you and your American values, and Dan Newhouse has not shown that he respects that responsibility at all.

I'm tired of RINO's.

We need to put America first leaders in Congress who respect our nation's sovereignty. We the people elect our representatives, and in turn,they swear to uphold and defend the constitution of the United States of America. I will always defend our constitution. We must take our stand and keep our constitutional republic.

Stand up for America!

Loren

Hi there, One need only hit the road to fall in love with Texas all over again. Every time Mike drives across Texas to talk to voters about the issues, he finds something new to appreciate — whether it’s the towering pecan trees, rolling hills, open fields and ranches, or the beaches of the Gulf Coast. You can’t beat it. body:
| | Friend, **Did you miss the email I sent you?** You only have a **FEW DAYS LEFT** to claim your **personalized and signed photo** from me. body:

-- Trump just held his BIGGEST rally since leaving office
-- He threatened to run for President if Republicans retake my House
-- And he just revealed Republicans can regain the Senate, too!

There’s no easy way to say this: Trump and Republicans just admitted to plotting a COMPLETE takeover of our government. And they have a whopping $90 MILLION in the bank to pull it off. I need an OVERWHELMING surge of Democrats to spring into action, help me defend our Majorities, and STOP Republicans from barging back into power. name: Jon Stewart
subject: update
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Friends—

It’s the final week of July, and I want to give you an inside look at where we are with fundraising.

1. Summer is a notoriously difficult time to raise money. If you’re planning to chip in to our campaign, this is the month to do it.

2. We’re 6 days away from our end-of-month deadline. That means we’re running out of time.

3. I just crunched the numbers, and we need to raise $11,982 online before Saturday to hit our goal. If you’re all in with Nikki, now is the time to chip in.

Now that you have the full picture, I hope you can help us out. Please click here to maximize your impact by donating during this critical week. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-nf-july-eom]

Here’s the thing: our campaign has the lowest average contribution size in this race, reflecting the grassroots support and excitement around Nikki’s candidacy. The overwhelming majority of our supporters are Floridians who are ready for something new.

So we mean this, friends: our campaign is a grassroots movement to break Florida’s system. Your contribution of $5 or $10 can make a massive difference.

This is a critical moment, and I’m hoping you can step up this week. Please click here to donate $5 or more if you’re able. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-nf-july-eom]

Thanks,

Jon Stewart

Deputy Finance Director

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Trump dinner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marjorie
body:
Dear Peter -- I don't have many friends in the D.C. Swamp. But
I didn't come to Washington to make friends.
I came to fight for the PEOPLE. And that's
exactly why I'm the Democrats' Public Enemy #1.
Impeach Biden. Fire Fauci.
Expel Maxine Waters. End the Mask Mandate.
Ban Critical Race Theory. Stop the Biden Vax
Mandate. . .
. . .these are the reason the D.C. Swamp
hates me so much. And I wouldn't have it any other way!
You see, I'd rather meet people like you,
people who actually care about America and want to preserve it
for future generations.
And that's exactly why I'm offering to fly
you and a friend up to Trump Hotel in D.C. to have dinner with
me.

All you have to di is enter to win! Even if
you've already entered, sign up again to increase your chances!
I'll cover the airfare, hotel, and dinner. .
.you just need to enter to win!
There will be two winners (each can bring a
friend)! I'll even fill you in on some behind-the-scenes stories.
We're going to have fun. Enter to win!
Good luck!
For freedom,
Marjorie Taylor Greene
ENTER TO WIN DINNER WITH MTG AT TRUMP HOTEL

fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Greene for

I’m disgusted.

My opponent Madison Cawthorn should be spending his time helping my community.

**Instead, Cawthorn spreads dangerous misinformation.** He spoke in front of thousands and grossly lied about our vaccine rollout.

subject: urgent alert:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bartos for US Senate |
body:

subject: Lots of "expert" political advice.
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33017421/297582053/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTMzOWFhNC0zZGVlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e-9ooTs5ovLWLULjKB7dQGAE_p8BHOTgUYH5NdlNF6g=) Friend,

When I ran for Congress in Texas's 31st District last year, I got a _lot_ of advice from political "experts."

The playbook was always the same: call wealthy donors, raise as much money as possible, and a few months before Election Day, purchase expensive TV ads.

**After speaking to hundreds of people in the district, I knew a conventional campaign wouldn't cut it here. We needed to bring solutions and demonstrate how we could improve lives. And despite being written-off early, we WON the Democratic primary.**

What's important to note is how we did it: We engaged the community around _real issues_ \-- healthcare, high-wage jobs and debt-free education. We went to over 50,000 doors to get our message out, and we came closer than anyone imagined to flipping TX-31 from red to blue.

We're building on that success in 2022. We can't give up on Texas just because it's gerrymandered. With your help, we can continue the work to bring a strong economic message to voters and turn Texas blue.

**[The end of the month is fast approaching, and we're still $16,718 short of where we need to be to launch our field effort in earnest. What we're trying to accomplish isn't just about flipping Texas blue.

This is about finally having a representative that meets constituents where they're at. It's about elevating the issues we care about and putting forward solutions -- not just talking about the problems we face.

Winning won't be easy, but I've seen what we can do when we come together -- whether it's in response to extreme weather events or the pandemic. That's exactly what we'll need to do in order to win this seat -- get our message to voters, wherever they are.

**[Each early donation we receive directly builds our growing movement, so please -- if you're able -- pitch in any amount to help us reach our goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33017446/297582080/77586780?refcode=em-07262021-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTMzOWFhNC0zZGVlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e-9ooTs5ovLWLULjKB7dQGAE_p8BHOTgUYH5NdlNF6g=)**

clean_body: | = Friend, When I ran for Congress in Texas's 31st District last year, I got a lot of advice from political "experts." The playbook was always the same: call wealthy donors, raise as much money as possible, and a few months before Election Day, purchase expensive TV ads. After speaking to hundreds of people in the district, I knew a conventional campaign wouldn't cut it here. We needed to bring solutions and demonstrate how we could improve lives. And despite being written-off early, we WON the Democratic primary. What's important to note is how we did it: We engaged the community around real issues \-- healthcare, high-wage jobs and debt-free education. We went to over 50,000 doors to get our message out, and we came closer than anyone imagined to flipping TX-31 from red to blue. We're building on that success in 2022. We can't give up on Texas just because it's gerrymandered. With your help, we can continue the work to bring a strong economic message to voters and turn Texas blue. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = What we're trying to accomplish isn't just about flipping Texas blue. This is about finally having a representative that meets constituents where they're at. It's about elevating the issues we care about and putting forward solutions -- not just talking about the problems we face. Winning won't be easy, but I've seen what we can do when we come together -- whether it's in response to extreme weather events or the pandemic. That's exactly what we'll need to do in order to win this seat -- get our message to voters, wherever they are. = Thanks in advance, Donna = | = Donna Imam is a computer engineer and Democrat running for Congress in Austin, Texas. Right now Austin is represented by three right-wing GOP members due to gerrymandering. But since Texas is gaining two new districts in 2022, this is our best chance to change that. If you'd like to learn more, you can visit Donna's website here: Consider supporting Donna's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717. Please make the check payable to Donna Imam for Congress. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Donna Imam For Congress PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717 United States

**President Joe Biden's first six months in office have been _amazingly bad._**

[ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=660d524f888741909e65d85b6eccbdda&_e=ejV73V5VcRfxVL7TrwfDIbgVuo7jrcNDbEbTPh5NpNvwl8Ci4CoVgNYH-1-Oc0DHmA8qe5nqg4SLKPe7A4Q-U513tCFScfZvnwELtR35pZsW1wUHZ7ZCv_iuUvNJR8DOchcj2I3rDxGphjG_1LaokhUsm4QcUEoJTgaApW7Zo9gBAVvHbpVIXjk2z4G3QfMCcSXcDYJ7gtqxRBOFEe-qAE3Yp6B8rsSQLAnerxw4HPD-fFSJfATkiUqX6J-mbLnGWdcovjOkUOSIx53NXbwRlSiXhf666V_3HkTdLuo-nqVb2HAZBTcLdN1WbSlhhBmyGACurtNEThJrLLKaNZOHldORzrlzW9XL4n7CxtNNusi7pgfPFMwteZHe6S1lRBa9HzX4DGWvxUVuzQ3HNpiyGJXl38wixgnQnPevL7jHmbN1wGuTQmbNWvVz5UzCFMpEQeMOtHwP_o51r5A-JsqZ4eW9KXC3LjKdP7_rHFCEvys%3D)
Our southern border with Mexico is in chaos. We are seeing the highest levels of illegal immigration in _21 years_ with Customs and Border Patrol officers apprehending more than **1 million** migrants crossing the border this fiscal year.

In Afghanistan, where U.S. forces are completing a pullout, the radical Islamic insurgents of the Taliban are on the rise, executing prisoners and threatening to **reconquer the entire country.**

Meanwhile, China continues its aggressive military modernization program, flexing its muscles in the South China Sea, threatening Taiwan and our allies in the western Pacific.

_Here at home_ , bad policies, massive spending, and tax increase proposals are driving up prices and inflation for workers and families, while raising the national debt above $28 trillion.

**Fellow American, since Election Day last November, I've provided more than $5 million to the National Republican Senatorial Committee and Senate candidates to help retake the majority. With your help, _we will take that support to a whole new level_.**

It was the unprecedented outpouring of support from conservatives like you that made it possible for me to defeat the most expensive challenge in U.S. Senate election history, _but Republicans running in key races next year across the nation will need the same kind of extraordinary support to emerge victorious._

**[Fellow American, your support now is so important.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=660d524f888741909e65d85b6eccbdda&_e=ejV73V5VcRfxVL7TrwfDIbgVuo7jrcNDbEbTPh5NpNvwl8Ci4CoVgNYH-1-Oc0DHmA8qe5nqg4SLKPe7A4Q-U513tCFScfZvnwELtR35pZsW1wUHZ7ZCv_iuUvNJR8DOchcj2I3rDxGphjG_1LaokhUsm4QcUEoJTgaApW7Zo9gBAVvHbpVIXjk2z4G3QfMCcSXcDYJ7gtqxRBOFEe-qAE3Yp6B8rsSQLAnerxw4HPD-fFSJfATkiUqX6J-mbLnGWdcovjOkUOSIx53NXbwRlYQkrq5a_OtzZRhiGcB2jqxmYLSQDw3FhWcPkR_GXJqxZtufZop2TGsOpboj5udPvNpmOrN5wZRgiH9yD0vCEfO0R4VuMF1Kmh5-B6INSZbkt0BcWqi49ONE6j6T_1t_U8yLQcp5N3Iezkq269x4vALYJVNRZGJOliaMr63-F9S9T7Qa5sFmqRvSAEM3UTtzYp7czwR5pUjsS_F8l6n5sYI%3D) It helps lay the early foundation for successfully reaching voters with our conservative agenda to win huge victories at the polls.**

I know we still face a tremendous challenge on Capitol Hill, working to resist the worst excesses of the radical Biden-Harris-Schumer Democrat agenda _until our opportunity comes to defeat them in 2022._

**[I hope you'll act today and make your impact](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=660d524f888741909e65d85b6eccbdda&_e=ejV73V5VcRfxVL7TrwfDIbgVuo7jrcNDbEbTPh5NpNvwl8Ci4CoVgNYH-1-Oc0DHmA8qe5nqg4SLKPe7A4Q-U513tCFScfZvnwELtR35pZsW1wUHZ7ZCv_iuUvNJR8DOchcj2I3rDxGphjG_1LaokhUsm4QcUEoJTgaApW7Zo9gBAVvHbpVIXjk2z4G3QfMCcSXcDYJ7gtqxRBOFEe-qAE3Yp6B8rsSQLAnerxw4HPD-fFSJfATkiUqX6J-mbLnGWdcovjOkUOSIx53NXbwRlTxTVD2LqDtYhdrbVY05GUvVZk-TbnC7tCkbyY_L58svpyjVww3T5HMAojKPQ5AXJ-66es_myQ8iMKpihBwIFpL8VEshOoLsnO8tJ3lOFiqrwzKXkSiR2fBeR4kI3W9nqg-0bB5pV-ounObvfOyGq9fHSGfR8V2jj1eChoBx65s1E1jcHtjencyvuDtWmzrY5KLTlbjTOSB0LiVi40nBaSQ%3D)** on our **RECLAIM THE MAJORITY** project.

clean_body: Let’s bring the amazingly bad Biden-Harris-Schumer Democrat agenda to a screeching halt! Support our GOP fight to Reclaim the Majority today! Let's bring the amazingly bad Biden-Harris-Schumer Democrat agenda to a screeching halt! Support our GOP fight to Reclaim the Majority today! | Fellow American, President Joe Biden's first six months in office have been amazingly bad. Our southern border with Mexico is in chaos. We are seeing the highest levels of illegal immigration in 21 years with Customs and Border Patrol officers apprehending more than 1 million migrants crossing the border this fiscal year. In Afghanistan, where U.S. forces are completing a pullout, the radical Islamic insurgents of the Taliban are on the rise, executing prisoners and threatening to reconquer the entire country. Meanwhile, China continues its aggressive military modernization program, flexing its muscles in the South China Sea, threatening Taiwan and our allies in the western Pacific. Here at home , bad policies, massive spending, and tax increase proposals are driving up prices and inflation for workers and families, while raising the national debt above $28 trillion. | Fellow American, I'm sure you'll agree - the Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security, and we MUST reclaim our crucial Republican Senate Majority to pull our country out of this leftist tailspin. That's why I founded the RECLAIM THE MAJORITY project, Our best hope for the future of this nation rests in our ability to stop the Democrats and their disastrous agenda with historic victories in next year's pivotal 2022 Midterm Elections. We only need to wrest one seat from the Chuck Schumer Democrats to return conservative leadership to the U.S. Senate - Fellow American, since Election Day last November, I've provided more than $5 million to the National Republican Senatorial Committee and Senate candidates to help retake the majority. With your help, we will take that support to a whole new level. It was the unprecedented outpouring of support from conservatives like you that made it possible for me to defeat the most expensive challenge in U.S. Senate election history, but Republicans running in key races next year across the nation will need the same kind of extraordinary support to emerge victorious. It helps lay the early foundation for successfully reaching voters with our conservative agenda to win huge victories at the polls. I know we still face a tremendous challenge on Capitol Hill, working to resist the worst excesses of the radical Biden-Harris-Schumer Democrat agenda until our opportunity comes to defeat them in 2022. on our RECLAIM THE MAJORITY project. Thanks, Lindsey Graham | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid For By Team Graham, Inc. Don't want to receive our emails?

Friend, The end of the month is going to be here before we know it, and that means another crucial fundraising deadline is approaching. [I want to talk about one of the key issues our state is facing and how this campaign can change it, but before I do, can you chip in $5 or $10 to help us hit our July fundraising goal by this Saturday at midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33017740/297582930/2118730081?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210726eom2_rs_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2E1YzBiZC0zZWVlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S3Oa9Akrkgs7CwZ_eNofUKIUkNuMMLy7Pj81aZHgD8g=) This past school year, teachers across the state of Iowa went above and beyond to ensure our children were taught despite the unprecedented challenges brought on by the pandemic. But they’re going to be faced with another challenge this year. You see, Iowa has only given out 2% of the $195M we were allocated in Federal rent aid. The state is not dispersing funds fast enough to folks who are going to be facing eviction as of August 1, or to landlords who are racking up debt of sometimes $100,000 because they’re not getting the relief that our state has the funding on hand for. This is going to have a huge impact on students heading into the classroom this August, because if you don’t have a place to live, it’s hard to learn. It’s hard for educators to teach students who don’t know where they’re going to sleep at night. _We can do better_. We can chart a new path and finally address this ongoing issue, but we have to hit our fundraising goals and continue to build a movement for change. [With that in mind, can I count on you to make a contribution of $10 or more to fuel this grassroots campaign so we can reach our July goal and keep up the fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33017741/297582931/2118730081?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210726eom2_rs_full_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2E1YzBiZC0zZWVlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S3Oa9Akrkgs7CwZ_eNofUKIUkNuMMLy7Pj81aZHgD8g=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: 2022 Senate Update (via MaggieHassan.com)
subject: Rick Scott is the latest Republican to target New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
**"I think we're going to win [New Hampshire]."
\- Rick Scott, NRSC Chairman** Rick Scott is the latest Republican to target New Hampshire, team. Attack after attack, it's clear that the Granite State will be ground-zero in the battle over Senate control, and GOP super PACs and special interest groups are already flooding the state with misinformation and dark money. On top of these repeated attacks, **a recent poll is showing Maggie DOWN by one point.** **[To fight back, we started the Emergency Polling Fund, but folks, we are falling short of our goal. Can you rush a donation of $5 right now to protect this seat and our fragile Senate majority? body:
History suggests that Republicans are in good shape to take back the House in 2022, and my friend Monica De La Cruz Hernandez is one of the candidates | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=505ad7159cb343e2b8345553440fac75&_e=U6KYJOiqyuufIScr8nodnQQDeSElsvjj4nD69AORRAKS7ozHi0kMGkGdItglAjMOTjRjzRGnvrG8S72ebxGwKrQ3iHiANVdfbLBHvPJU4P2ScIMhdwn18YzRzo5UTXwADd4Q9sydQ341fmnoVcVaE5Kfk8rGziNlOp8bfDTA-XuxkWc7apVpTUHJ2e8kKlGzfUOGUaW9a8DC7q1SA4JWVoaUxquqI6RjiWAA-yUX1PH_iFbtnguIP1dcKnqFVIvfCTvcXpGc3BN7iSVjNsOshmNIR-1S48SY2zViejd69tgTxHsA5ByBD2JQrsLiiWF9XHs6LOtbAsXmMGega6VvgtjqWv2H08YiXSd_tsn3n6Baaa9rxTl8-qgz-_TPUCuIJIM2eNH5Dhl7Fw1itfFYzg2H9sodoIQRj_zBIOxh8hVNQsTjySALim9cFpssARvsb_NHQyMXBWgq5Gl5178NWmkHdJKa8DBIAhvdeRW6E8ClTJ8rm7_13DQtPI6phBvL)

Fellow patriot,

As a conservative, I know you’ll appreciate this. **History suggests that Republicans will take back the majority in the House in the 2022 midterm election** but we have one problem; the Left has never controlled the media quite like they do today.

To pull this off, we’ll need a team effort from conservatives everywhere, including you Fellow patriot. That’s why I need you to know about my fellow Texan, a conservative running for Congress, Monica De La Cruz Hernandez. **[If there’s ever been a candidate that deserves your support in this election, it’s Monica](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=505ad7159cb343e2b8345553440fac75&_e=U6KYJOiqyuufIScr8nodnQQDeSElsvjj4nD69AORRAKS7ozHi0kMGkGdItglAjMOTjRjzRGnvrG8S72ebxGwKrQ3iHiANVdfbLBHvPJU4P2ScIMhdwn18YzRzo5UTXwADd4Q9sydQ341fmnoVcVaE5Kfk8rGziNlOp8bfDTA-XuxkWc7apVpTUHJ2e8kKlGzfUOGUaW9a8DC7q1SA4JWVoaUxquqI6RjiWAA-yUX1PH_iFbtnguIP1dcKnqFVIvfCTvcXpGc3BN7iSVjNsOshmNIR-1S48SY2zViejd69til8ftlXMbFj9H8UNcCqTsqd3HmPwHsWK20oh1LOSxNUCZq7gb0OoHx_z_z-3rDF765gKqAJnVlRBEmu7VUUKFD8kI0Ucj28SbR3rtE45fIagZak13hzDNmnD1bcVWVcwPmy_-4lTbcXVWEbkDPu1acx6XcL9VdvUFbXKcGTcmwHCTk5qDdWnzVQF8257ksHs9Nb2yryIZYQWbTZU_EymDe)**.

In the 2020 election, Monica narrowly fell short of winning a congressional seat in South Texas, narrowly missing out on becoming the _first ever conservative Latina woman elected to Congress from her district_! When I say she narrowly lost, I mean it.**Monica fell short by just 6,588 votes – out of more than 228,000 votes cast -- and I think she’s got a real shot at winning this time around!**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=505ad7159cb343e2b8345553440fac75&_e=U6KYJOiqyuufIScr8nodnQQDeSElsvjj4nD69AORRAKS7ozHi0kMGkGdItglAjMOTjRjzRGnvrG8S72ebxGwKrQ3iHiANVdfbLBHvPJU4P2ScIMhdwn18YzRzo5UTXwADd4Q9sydQ341fmnoVcVaE5Kfk8rGziNlOp8bfDTA-XuxkWc7apVpTUHJ2e8kKlGzfUOGUaW9a8DC7q1SA4JWVoaUxquqI6RjiWAA-yUX1PH_iFbtnguIP1dcKnqFVIvfCTvcXpGc3BN7iSVjNsOshmNIR-1S48SY2zViejd69tiVKO198ML_FezoDZTlwCtnQxLGgCA2gDY7YApiiK4AT1rWepMZWOCAFryS602-wFYL6NPAfluAZzUYixjj42tLsGZENJucUWrXZBtN-eYFFTeAMzsy5av-eOeQxmafMrH4T7IvDwy50WNHXvgwO5becXBCZiRdrUNfR-yYm7h5Yxg9tKT2MiHmSI7mYyBn6V_eMRhlhLBsBgGwszn36n4S)

**With the Democrats completely ignoring our border communities right now, Monica should be able to overcome the 6,000-vote deficit and if she does, she’ll play an instrumental role in the Republican Party re-establishing a House majority. While many Republicans walked away from President Trump at the first sign of a fight, I NEVER wavered.
---
I stood by the President’s side throughout his toughest battles:

**Two baseless impeachment trials
The Russia witch hunt
Exposing the Biden Family’s corruption
Uncovering election fraud **
---
You see, we were on a mission to drain the swamp and put the American people first. We knew that the Deep State forces would try to destroy us.
---
But we didn’t care. The fight to save America was a fight worth waging.
---
_Unfortunately, now that Biden and Kamala have seized control of the White House and have weaponized the FBI and DOJ, the swamp is REVOLTING by placing a bull’s eye on the backs of every Trump loyalist who had the guts to challenge the Deep State._
---
I’m hoping you’ll stand up for me now that the Deep State has placed a bull’s eye on my back.

---

---
That’s why this is so important, Friend.

This battle is not just about me or any of President Trump’s other allies who are being ruthlessly targeted by the Deep State.

We need to face the uncomfortable fact that if the Deep State can do this to a former president’s confidante who did nothing wrong, then one day, they could do it to you.
---
My fate will determine if America still is a Republic governed by We The People, or if the swamp has finally amassed total control of our great country.

That's why I urgently need YOUR help as I battle for my freedom and justice.
---

Thank you,

name: Sarah for Wisconsin
subject: Three things
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Here are three things you should know about Wisconsin's battleground race for the United States Senate, Peter:
1. _CNN_ called Ron Johnson the most vulnerable GOP senator up in 2022. With one of the weakest approval ratings among Senate Republicans, Johnson isn't even surprised -- saying he "may not be the best candidate" to keep this seat red.

2. This race is a toss-up. _The Cook Political Report_ changed our race rating from Lean Republican to make us one of only two true toss-ups in this election. Experts believe Senate control might come down to Wisconsin, which means we need to make sure the scale tips in our favor.

3. National Republicans and Ron Johnson outraised Democrats last quarter -- they've got millions in the bank to defend this critical Senate seat. Sarah Godlewski refuses to take a single penny from corporate PACs, so the only way we can counter them is with donations from grassroots supporters like you.

**[We are asking you to donate to Sarah's grassroots campaign because we have a real shot at winning this U.S. Senate race in Wisconsin. But it's contributions from folks like you that will determine if we have the resources to build a winning organization for the long haul. name: Team Jayapal
subject: We don’t see your name on this yet, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Hey Peter, we just wanted to make sure you saw our message from the other day.
Pramila is working hard to expand Medicare alongside Senator Bernie Sanders and a broad coalition of Democrats. This is a huge opportunity to expand health care to millions of Americans while we continue fighting for Medicare for All — _but time is running out to make it happen._
[**Can you add your name to our petition calling on Congress to lower the Medicare eligibility age, improve benefits, and empower Medicare to negotiate down the price of prescription drugs?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4711?t=1&akid=493%2E420207%2EWhfZKl)
**[Add your name »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4711?t=2&akid=493%2E420207%2EWhfZKl)**
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Jayapal HQ
Date: Thu, Jul 22, 2021
Subject: Add your name: Expand Medicare now! Call on Congress to lower the eligibility age and improve Benefits
Peter,
Thanks to our movement’s organizing, Senate Democrats are including Medicare expansion in their next big spending bill — that’s a BIG win in Pramila’s hard-fought battle to finally guarantee health care as a human right in this country.
Unfortunately, the Senate proposal only includes improving Medicare benefits to finally cover hearing, dental, and vision. **It does NOT yet lower the Medicare eligibility age, which would immediately expand coverage to at least 23 million additional Americans.**
Senate Democrats and President Biden need to keep their promises to the American people and lower the eligibility age — _and it’s on us to keep the pressure up until they deliver._ **[Will you add your name to join Pramila in calling on Congress to lower the Medicare eligibility age, improve benefits, and empower Medicare to negotiate down the price of prescription drugs?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4711?t=3&akid=493%2E420207%2EWhfZKl)**
**[Add your name »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4711?t=4&akid=493%2E420207%2EWhfZKl)**
What we’re asking for here isn’t unreasonable. President Biden supported these policies on the campaign trail, and a recent poll showed that people across America — Democrats and Republicans alike — do too.
The same is true inside Congress. More than 70% of Democrats in the House, including folks in tough re-election fights, support expanding Medicare _because it’s good policy_ — but also because we want to show people across America that we’ve delivered for them.
**Opening Medicare to millions of new folks gets people care who didn’t have it before, and lowering prescription costs can help people finally get the medicine they need to survive.**
Together, we can enact this historic expansion of health care and lower costs for millions of people. **[Add your name today and join us in calling on Congress to lower the Medicare eligibility age, improve benefits, and empower Medicare to negotiate down the price of prescription drugs.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4711?t=5&akid=493%2E420207%2EWhfZKl)**
**[Add your name »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4711?t=6&akid=493%2E420207%2EWhfZKl)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

clean_body: Hey Peter, we just wanted to make sure you saw our message from the other day. Pramila is working hard to expand Medicare alongside Senator Bernie Sanders and a broad coalition of Democrats. This is a huge opportunity to expand health care to millions of Americans while we continue fighting for Medicare for All — but time is running out to make it happen. \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Jayapal HQ Date: Thu, Jul 22, 2021 Subject: Add your name: Expand Medicare now! Call on Congress to lower the eligibility age and improve Benefits Peter, Thanks to our movement’s organizing, Senate Democrats are including Medicare expansion in their next big spending bill — that’s a BIG win in Pramila’s hard-fought battle to finally guarantee health care as a human right in this country. Unfortunately, the Senate proposal only includes improving Medicare benefits to finally cover hearing, dental, and vision. It does NOT yet lower the Medicare eligibility age, which would immediately expand coverage to at least 23 million additional Americans. Senate Democrats and President Biden need to keep their promises to the American people and lower the eligibility age — and it’s on us to keep the pressure up until they deliver. What we’re asking for here isn’t unreasonable. President Biden supported these policies on the campaign trail, and a recent poll showed that people across America — Democrats and Republicans alike — do too. The same is true inside Congress. More than 70% of Democrats in the House, including folks in tough re-election fights, support expanding Medicare because it’s good policy — but also because we want to show people across America that we’ve delivered for them. Opening Medicare to millions of new folks gets people care who didn’t have it before, and lowering prescription costs can help people finally get the medicine they need to survive. Together, we can enact this historic expansion of health care and lower costs for millions of people. In solidarity, Team Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

Many continue to deny the reality of climate change, even as unprecedented extreme weather events happen right before their eyes. That’s why I’m counting on your help to do everything we can to protect our wins, strengthen our majorities in both houses of Congress, and deliver on our promises to our country. **So, I have one ask for you: Will you chip in whatever you can ahead of our upcoming end-of-month deadline? Fellow Conservative,

My name is Yvette Herrell. I am a proud pro-Trump Republican and conservative warrior who flipped a congressional seat from the Democrats in the last election.

The Democrats will stop at nothing to force their socialist agenda on America – and they will try to unseat any Trump-supporting conservative who stands in their way. **And since I took this seat from the Democrats in the last election...**

**I am one of the Democrats’ TOP TARGETS in 2022.**

name: Karen Bass
subject: At least 127,000 children in Los Angeles County will be lifted out of poverty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Team,

Throughout my time in public service, I've heard from too many mothers, fathers, and guardians that they're worried. Worried about paying the bills on time. Fearful of not being able to afford the rent each month. Stretching every last dollar to pay for school supplies, extracurricular activities, and lunch.

Too many families are living paycheck to paycheck. And the COVID-19 pandemic only exacerbated this issue. President Joe Biden made a promise to build our nation back better, and now, we have an opportunity to invest in historic social justice efforts that are long overdue.

One of those investments is the newly expanded Child Tax Credit. This is the most recent anti-poverty investment in American history. Millions of families across the country -- including 748,000 families in Los Angeles County -- now have access to a guaranteed, monthly income that will help with rent, food, medicine, bills, and other basic necessities.

**[It's past time that the federal government invests in working families. But here's the thing, friend -- we can't stop here. To build an equitable economy and forward social justice, we have to keep fighting for working families. clean_body: Team, Throughout my time in public service, I've heard from too many mothers, fathers, and guardians that they're worried. Worried about paying the bills on time. Fearful of not being able to afford the rent each month. Stretching every last dollar to pay for school supplies, extracurricular activities, and lunch. Too many families are living paycheck to paycheck. And the COVID-19 pandemic only exacerbated this issue. President Joe Biden made a promise to build our nation back better, and now, we have an opportunity to invest in historic social justice efforts that are long overdue. One of those investments is the newly expanded Child Tax Credit. This is the most recent anti-poverty investment in American history. Millions of families across the country -- including 748,000 families in Los Angeles County -- now have access to a guaranteed, monthly income that will help with rent, food, medicine, bills, and other basic necessities. The child tax credit will help set our children up for success and put more money in the pockets of hard-working parents. I'm proud that Congress and President Biden were able to secure this major investment for the people. I'll keep fighting for bold solutions to poverty, and I hope you'll keep up the fight with me. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Big Tech lawsuit FILED - Free speech on the line Peter
body:
Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. For almost an entire year, big tech corporations like Twitter, Facebook, and Google have silenced and censored millions of conservative Americans for speaking freely or questioning the government-approved "opinions" on the coronavirus or the 2020 presidential election. And if that wasn't bad enough, we've now uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with these Big Tech corporations to de-platform and silence conservatives for raising legitimate concerns over the integrity of the 2020 election. ** ** **In other words, we 've caught big government unconstitutionally colluding with big tech to silence their political opponents...** And unless folks like you and me take immediate action to stop this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. [**That is why I am urgently asking you and every other American patriot reading this letter to contribute $35 or more to help us sue Twitter and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58014085:Jz2eh9lEN:m:1:3253819041:C128147896A469719FC0C666496406E9:r) Let me explain... In 2018, the state government of California created the Office of Elections Cybersecurity to "educate voters" with "valid information" on election laws and procedures. And as any sensible person could predict, this office quickly devolved into a political weapon for censorship by the far-left Secretary of State's Office. The reason I mention this is because this past February, conservative lawyer and activist Rogan O'Handley logged onto Twitter when he found that he had been banned from Twitter for violating the governments "rules about election integrity". [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58014085:Jz2eh9lEN:m:1:3253819041:C128147896A469719FC0C666496406E9:r) You see, from November 2020 to February 2021, Rogan tweeted a series of messages expressing his concerns over the dubious presidential election procedures and skepticism over the results. And every time he made a statement that was deemed a "violation", it was promptly removed from Twitter. But that is not the worst of it... Recently, documents were found showing that leftist operatives within the Election Cybersecurity office flagged Rogan's tweets as "misinformation" and coded it as an "orange" level threat indicating problematic speech. _**Then it happened ...**_ After Rogan dared to question the legitimacy of the number of votes Joe Biden received during the election, Twitter permanently suspended Rogan altogether. Hopefully I don't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs and opinions is a gross violation of our freedom of speech. But Rogan's Twitter account was wildly popular and followed by more than four hundred thousand people. So, it was clear that the only reason his account was suspended was because left was worried that Rogan's tweets could damage Joe Biden's image. In fact, Rogan's opinions didn't just threaten the image of Joe Biden. The liberal elites responsible for de-platforming Rogan were also worries that his tweets would destroy the image of then-California Secretary of State Alex Padilla - _who at the time was being considered to fill Kamala Harris ' vacated Senate seat. _ It's doesn't take a rocket-scientist to see that this collusion between big government and big tech to silence political opponents is corrupt and wildly unconstitutional. **And that 's why me and my team of superb constitutional lawyers are suing Twitter, Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberal elites for their unconstitutional assault on the First Amendment. ** ** ** [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58014085:Jz2eh9lEN:m:1:3253819041:C128147896A469719FC0C666496406E9:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I founded the Center for American Liberty to defend our constitutionally guaranteed civil liberties from the corporations, politicians, socialist revolutionaries, and inept or bias government officials who try to infringe them. But I'll be honest with you, I never thought the assault on our individual rights would become this bad. Not only are we suing Twitter - a multi-billion-dollar corporation - for their gross infringement on Rogan's First Amendment right to free speech... We are simultaneously taking on the former-Secretary of State of California Alex Padilla for blatantly colluding with Twitter to silence conservative Americans for sharing their political opinions. **And even though we intend to win, this will be the hardest legal battle we 've ever fought.** You see, as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the help of like-minded conservative patriots like yourself. _ _ _And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000._ _ _ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a one-time contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58014085:Jz2eh9lEN:m:1:3253819041:C128147896A469719FC0C666496406E9:r) I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, corporations, and government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still the master of our own lives? [**I hope you join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing any amount to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58014085:Jz2eh9lEN:m:1:3253819041:C128147896A469719FC0C666496406E9:r) Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures lambasted President Trump for the completely bogus allegations that he colluded with a foreign power to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech billionaires to influence the 2020 election, those same leftists are completely silent. I don't know about you, but I am fed up with the left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and flagrant unconstitutional behavior. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58014085:Jz2eh9lEN:m:1:3253819041:C128147896A469719FC0C666496406E9:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58014085:Jz2eh9lEN:m:1:3253819041:C128147896A469719FC0C666496406E9:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58014085:Jz2eh9lEN:m:1:3253819041:C128147896A469719FC0C666496406E9:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58014085:Jz2eh9lEN:m:1:3253819041:C128147896A469719FC0C666496406E9:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58014086:Jz2eh9lEN:m:1:3253819041:C128147896A469719FC0C666496406E9:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

The Left is going after everything America loves. First, it was Dr. Seuss. Then, it was the 4th of July. **Now, it’s Chick-fil-A. **

They’re plowing through canceling everything that doesn’t fit with their socialist agenda, Fellow Patriot. **If you want to join us in canceling cancel culture, then this is the perfect opportunity.**

[CLAIM YOUR MUG](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d2bf10d4ac534d6c9651db57ec499e05&_e=QJj-uFOCEdbpi6dVXROXR8aYA02JP2xrvrJdtPYxtBeZHJ5yUIXDxEfLXx3QbFoMmoPCRHSOBizqLwthkVhK50GAJSVi-6bahoFTWtDfGMPDZpq8xxaExnfvz-EqiEnDHHM93Ydx1To5sfE4bUAyl03rt-IHRkqsdW3fQPqWoeqC2xko8GVTmL7_T3cJzGFdbtUzq4sCMYnR4G2y1RZx405N3zeqTUENFdk_t3eQd2yhHRaNon4JCEo_k2-kdmZXe496TuoqAnGg1Cz5GeqpY_oXfTUr6phZsv4v3Xz7hK5oaz7laLrPAvUJH-Z4Za1TssOwq4pwp8_yW24sB-7N6xKe4erCYyjQCkPyexGSOuDZ-I2yXwI6vjuv7Q3BKMYufM0dLUd3dbPUNtT19WmTk8sGPusM6RMnSIWGRzPI1FJM5KdNtNNc1WjApugXJ0CBkcebz3GBI1uWHTB57_S4SACA7t_Ls1i8WE6W6aXxCQwXq62cbA3v2J8zK3v4ej3Fh6A8D3dTGOGW1oFqw0ahHegNMDYDrLW-1iTmhNoBzYqsIHFP5wHUJDNhRnRsiPGlc6WGQ7zN_lm5K0jDRLPVIuUtsdB009zjoX9AJcxNWYM%3D)

name: James Hartnett
subject: Staying on the right track
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hey Peter, it’s James.
It’s been over three months since Stewart announced he was running to represent our district in Congress. In those three months, the mission has become clearer than ever.
We have a divided country that needs leaders who will work together to help us forge ahead and restore trust in our democracy. Those leaders should bring us together to defend democracy, rather than seek to divide us and sew chaos.
As the first month of the quarter nears an end, I want to see if our campaign can raise $5,000 to give Stewart a boost to start out the summer strong. Can you chip in $5 or $10 today to help us get there? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2107-q3-sn-eom?refcode=210726-email]
We can all see that our country is in a very precarious situation right now. Stewart’s steady hand and bold leadership are exactly what we need in a time like this.
Let’s send him to Congress by chipping in today. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2107-q3-sn-eom?refcode=210726-email]
Thanks so much,
Best,
James
Finance Director
Stewart Navarre is a Democrat running for Virginia's 1st Congressional District. He's ready to serve his fellow Virginians with integrity, ethics, and hard work. Support Stewart with a donation today.

Fredericksburg, VA 22404
United States
