name: NEW POLL ALERT (via DCCC)
subject: America REJECTS Republican voter suppression
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you stand with the majority of Americans who believe voting rights should not be restricted? | | | **LATEST POLL: 57% of Americans say voting is "a fundamental right for every adult U.S. citizen and should not be restricted in any way."**

---
| **_CALLING FOR YOUR IMMEDIATE INPUT:_**

A brand new poll found that a majority of Americans believe voting rights should not be restricted.

But Republicans have introduced HUNDREDS of voter suppression bills all across the country -- ignoring the will of the American people.

So we need to know:**

Do you stand with the majority of Americans who believe voting rights should not be restricted? **
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/AGmXQyLpW-)
---|---|---

We need you to see this.

**The latest poll shows that a strong majority of Americans believe voting rights should not be restricted in any way.**

But that hasn't stopped Republicans from disregarding the American people and RAMMING THROUGH voter suppression bills all across the country.

It's clear that Republicans' top priority is to avenge Trump's defeat and sabotage our Democrats by attacking voting rights and our democracy.

Worst of all, they think they can get away with it.

**But we have something the Republicans don 't: This INCREDIBLE grassroots team!**

We must do all we can to end their voter suppression crusade once and for all, which means every last grassroots Democrat all across the country needs to rise up and tell us they will defend voting rights at this crucial moment.
**So before midnight, let us know:[ Do you stand with the majority of Americans who believe our fundamental voting rights should not be restricted?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)**
| [YES ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-cgK7-) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/~j-)
---|---|---

Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45358321&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA0NjE4OTQwMwS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. clean_body: Do you stand with the majority of Americans who believe voting rights should not be restricted? | | | LATEST POLL: 57% of Americans say voting is "a fundamental right for every adult U.S. citizen and should not be restricted in any way." | CALLING FOR YOUR IMMEDIATE INPUT: A brand new poll found that a majority of Americans believe voting rights should not be restricted. But Republicans have introduced HUNDREDS of voter suppression bills all across the country -- ignoring the will of the American people. So we need to know: Do you stand with the majority of Americans who believe voting rights should not be restricted? | | ---|---|--- We need you to see this. The latest poll shows that a strong majority of Americans believe voting rights should not be restricted in any way. But that hasn't stopped Republicans from disregarding the American people and RAMMING THROUGH voter suppression bills all across the country. It's clear that Republicans' top priority is to avenge Trump's defeat and sabotage our Democrats by attacking voting rights and our democracy. Worst of all, they think they can get away with it. But we have something the Republicans don 't: This INCREDIBLE grassroots team! clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, Anthony Fauci refuses to tell the truth. We know that the NIH sent money through to the Communist Chinese Wuhan lab through EcoHealth Alliance. And we know that the Wuhan lab was doing gain-of-function research based on the definition from the NIH. Yet, Anthony Fauci refuses to admit these facts. Instead, he tries to redefine terms and avoid the truth. The American people deserve honest answers, not semantic word play. Rather than honestly answer straightforward questions, Anthony Fauci instead chooses to attack me for shining a light on his deception. I will not allow Anthony Fauci to continue to deceive the American people. From the very beginning, I have led the fight to expose Anthony Fauci for misleading the American people. From mask mandates to the Coronavirus' origin, I have always fought to find the truth. That is why the Left has attacked me and supported Anthony Fauci, even when he refuses to be honest with the American people. The radical Left rallied around their king to defend his misleading testimony. They willingly agree with statements we know to be false to hold onto power. But I will not back down to the cult of Fauci. Anthony Fauci has shown suspect judgment time after time. In 2012, when discussing gain-of-function research, he stated that the “benefits of such experiments and the resulting knowledge outweigh the risks.” He was willing to risk a pandemic to continue the same type of research the Wuhan lab conducted. Then as the NIH Director, he funded the Wuhan lab where evidence suggests COVID-19 may have originated. Now he will not take any responsibility for funding dangerous research in the Communist Chinese lab. How many more bad judgments will Anthony Fauci make before we can finally fire him? Anthony Fauci is making more money off the backs of taxpayers than any government official, yet he continues to deceive the American people. Enough is enough. Anthony Fauci should be fired immediately. I’m not here in the Senate to play nice and make friends with DC bureaucrats. In Liberty, | | ****** Rand Paul U.S. Senator (R-KY) | | ******P.S. \- Anthony Fauci refuses to tell the American people the truth. And the radical Left defends his deception. I will continue to fight for the truth the American people deserve. **** | | | | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate | No longer want to receive these emails? . It’s important to me that we keep you up to date with everything that’s been going on, and this month has been particularly busy! Here are some of the things that have come up in July:
* * *
## **CAMPAIGN UPDATES**
**A fifth Republican opponent has filed to run against me.** This race is becoming more crowded and more competitive, FIRSTNAME. National Republicans spent millions attacking me in an attempt to flip this seat last year, and we’re expecting them to do it again. Political experts are predicting that our district is **a toss-up** , so the stakes are higher than ever. However, thanks to amazing supporters like you, **we knocked our June fundraising goal out of the park**! This campaign is fueled by your contributions and they have a huge impact on our ability to reach every Nevadan in the 3rd District. Thank you for your support in our fight to keep NV-03 BLUE and for helping our campaign keep up the momentum.
* * *
## **POLICY UPDATES**
* I worked across the aisle to help secure a critical $1.2 trillion bipartisan infrastructure package to put key investments into our roads, bridges, Western water storage, broadband and high-speed rail that is a long overdue investment in our nation’s infrastructure

* The desert southwest is experiencing a historic drought, with Lake Mead’s water levels at its lowest since the creation of the Hoover Dam in the 1930s. That’s why I introduced the **Large Scale Water Recycling Project Investment Act** , creating a water recycling grant program throughout Western states.

* * *
July has been a big month for our team, and I can’t wait to see what we accomplish next month. Thanks for your support! Talk to you soon! Community: When he got home, he and his wife started a business, made it on Shark Tank and secured a deal with Kevin O'Leary and Mark Cuban! They've grown the business from a startup in their garage to a multimillion dollar business that employs veterans in Arizona. Family: Most important to Eli, he is the proud husband to his wife, Jen and father of two young girls. Eli's life has been about service, Friend, and he can't sit on the sidelines any longer. Current AZ-01 Congressman, Tom O'Halleran, has voted with Nancy Pelosi 96% of the time. That's NOT what the people of Arizona want or need, Friend. That's why we need to get Eli to Congress, retake the conservative majority and reinstate Trumps' American First policies before Democrats run this country into the ground! Thank you, Will Liberty Alerts Paid for by Crane For Congress PO Box 1950 Cortaro, AZ 85652 Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. name: Team DeSantis
subject: Fight Wokeness
body:
As we root for Team USA this summer, we must demand fairness and competitiveness in women’s sports!
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hjMrvyePtBDZPMBctiH-WOS0CbwcVG_WWCIzMuH4qEX09JBv9iCsx0H3xvar7S2GRQ4WacoSUctddlC07uLIlvQxrK-Gizrg_GLJ4wW5lnTDjYxgalNslpPxcTn06-KqlxJyiz2vMbJ0f2WQ0JQujA==&c=nGKTzCvfNh8Kz0BNvbm1PM85si1fBGcH7MWMk_aYsEuXwGGiBiwvAQ==&ch=7rAGZMRLKqrsVQ-vKFw-29MAA8HhnMZR4-QMpCShl_xAgeaOCd6qLA==)
---
| Peter,
The Olympics has traditionally been the epitome of tough, fair competition.
Yet, in this age of wokeness, the Summer Olympics in Tokyo has embraced an uneven playing field for women's athletics.
It is entirely unfair to force women athletes to compete against men. What is the point of competition when one side is given a significant unfair advantage?
Governor DeSantis is fighting back against this inequity by signing the Fairness in Women's Sports Act! This bill protects female athletes in Florida and guarantees the opportunity for a level playing field where women can demonstrate their skill.
Sports can teach many valuable lessons, but with Democrats trying to destroy fair competition in female athletics, women gaining that valued experience is at risk.
[Show your support to protect equal opportunity in women's sports by signing the petition now!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hjMrvyePtBDZPMBctiH-WOS0CbwcVG_WWCIzMuH4qEX09JBv9iCsx5OtHchkLODMBskKNeV_Z3bhXrI_RE8fNQ98AQHDMz6a7h4dT3PymKS9DDOaqaezFaoBUv90z2dJ5TNwKIwSP7UxdQMex8FuXgWfGamKhG1dYT2WspUAr6LZSMGNHml22Q==&c=nGKTzCvfNh8Kz0BNvbm1PM85si1fBGcH7MWMk_aYsEuXwGGiBiwvAQ==&ch=7rAGZMRLKqrsVQ-vKFw-29MAA8HhnMZR4-QMpCShl_xAgeaOCd6qLA==)
As we root for Team USA this summer, we must demand fairness and competitiveness in women's sports!
Thank you for supporting female athletes everywhere! Team DeSantis

He's calling on YOU to become the FIRST This offer expires at the end of the day, Friend, so don't wait. \--------- Forwarded Message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Subject: I need YOU Friend, The RADICAL Democrats and their friends in BIG TECH are doing everything in their power to SILENCE real Americans like you and me. But I will NEVER back down, and neither will the GOP. I am standing alongside the Republican Party to protect OUR freedom and OUR rights against the RADICAL SOCIALISTS that are destroying this country. We MUST defeat the Democrats and their RADICAL agenda, but we cannot do it without YOU. I need you to stand with the GOP to help us WIN in 2022. If you don't step up, everything we have achieved will be destroyed. That's why I need you to accept your invitation and become the VERY FIRST 2021 Trump Life Member. This brand-new membership program was specifically created for TOP supporters of the Republican Party who are dedicated to fighting the RADICAL SOCIALIST agenda of the Left. Everything our movement stands for is on the line right now, and I need to know that I can count on you to help Republicans WIN in 2022. The future of our Nation will be on the ballot next year and I'm counting on YOU, Friend, to make sure that Republicans have the resources to WIN. **Texas Provides a Model for Conservative Healthcare Reform **

By Bobby Jindal
Republicans passed a package of market-friendly laws to expand access and increase competition.
|
---
The Supreme Court ruled in 2012 that the federal government couldn’t force states to expand Medicaid as part of the Affordable Care Act. Ever since, Democrats and hospital lobbyists have looked for ways to push state legislators to let able-bodied adults earning up to 138% of the federal poverty level into Medicaid. In the last Covid relief bill, Democrats tried to give states more temporary money to expand Medicaid. Now they are considering legislation to allow Democratic cities in Republican states to expand Medicaid on their own. But Texas Republicans have modeled a better way to get Americans affordable healthcare.

Unfortunately, the Lone Star State is in the minority. Thirty-eight states and the District of Columbia have expanded or approved expansion of their programs. Democrats complain the other 12 states are turning down billions of “free” federal dollars while leaving millions uninsured. As a candidate, Joe Biden proposed creating a government-run plan for low-income people in states that don’t expand Medicaid.

Republicans resisting expansion argue that taxpayers end up paying for “free” federal dollars. State governments receive federal funding for a portion of each dollar they spend on Medicaid, but must provide matching funds from their own coffers. Expansion costs states billions in match requirements.

_Read more_**[HERE](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=841a8e608b5f462fbaa297affc849482&_e=wB0cVl6UqPZqn4yDIagX8B4NFCIKCFuiWmitu5YGyCNLf94yQg_fiflpZEl52tvSDSc_AOylb7nezucgePUR7WeYssWr0sSTBWFbDTJwbfr1-T4vbbV9Oa4iBldX-zk_KqMouan14iBZ324_6x_KKw7RsHAjLyl3qc_nj5Jb5WZJbVV2KoPMURXthOTewrtP5A6IGdvB3IZbrKUI4ig8uhcBxfefGrq3UiLvC2MzLrCD8ZuewFkm13Rojokq0zg3I3emDEryuzQmMGlbm-IypVegLoYIC58BJ1DwUyAGb4o1CSvsXjwiEgFE-LER1CJjIekweN85P3MX4qZjSRjfFQ%3D%3D)**.

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Stopping to smell the coffee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy Democrats
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/YTD8if_BgSBhB9PtpAIOGbpfhBSbr30jzI2nakQyKFU=/ICV5X0ILUXDYxUEf71rJL5GY0znGTvYH-IPqQsljvjM=?instance_id=983)
Peter,

We get caught up in the day-to-day of life too often to stop and smell the coffee (FYI - Wawa Original and Starbucks Pike Place are my favs), but the changes that occurred on July 26, 1990 were profound with the implementation of the Americans with Disabilities Act, or ADA.
Congress enacted this groundbreaking civil-rights law prohibiting discrimination based on disabilities and gave our fellow Americans a fair shot to live the American Dream - shaping the way people with disabilities compete in the workforce and giving them the ablity to live freely in our communities.
Thanks to the ADA, doors opened that were previously shut in higher education, medical care, travel and employment. But there is more work to be done, which is why I've partnered with Jake Tapper and Generals John Campbell and John Allen to support the non-profit Homes For Our Troops, giving our severely wounded Veterans and their families free homes (we've built over 300 so far). Maybe consider **_[joining us at the Army Navy Golf Course on August 9th](https://act.myngp.com/el/YTD8if_BgSBhB9PtpAIOGbpfhBSbr30jzI2nakQyKFU=/ICV5X0ILUXDYxUEf71rJL5GY0znGTvYH-IPqQsljvjM=?instance_id=983)_** and share this with golfing friends who'd love to play this incredible course.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/YTD8if_BgSBhB9PtpAIOGbpfhBSbr30jzI2nakQyKFU=/ICV5X0ILUXDYxUEf71rJL5GY0znGTvYH-IPqQsljvjM=?instance_id=983)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/YTD8if_BgSBhB9PtpAIOGbpfhBSbr30jzI2nakQyKFU=/ICV5X0ILUXDYxUEf71rJL5GY0znGTvYH-IPqQsljvjM=?instance_id=983)

There is more work for us to do, but take time to smell the coffee, appreciate how far we've come, and recognize the work still ahead of us to form a more perfect union.
Yours in the Fight for a Better America,
Patrick

Hon. Patrick J. Murphy
32nd Under Secretary of the Army
Former U.S. Congressman

Paid for by Kennedy Democrats
---
Kennedy Democrats
PO Box 2134
Bristol PA 19007 United States

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: New extreme anti-abortion law (need your response)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=MLvftOtAZZId7mWWmU1IteOjOarGSFN1&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
Texas is ground zero for extreme restrictions on women's reproductive healthcare - and a new law passed by the state GOP has an offensive twist on Republicans' outright assault on reproductive freedoms.
Texas Republicans have not only passed an unconstitutional ban on abortion beyond six weeks of pregnancy - before most women can know or even be aware that they are pregnant - but have also opened the door for anyone in the _entire country_ to sue Texas health clinics, doctors, and just about anyone who helps a woman exercise her constitutional reproductive rights.
The U.S. Supreme Court will soon rule on Mississippi's abortion ban, which could effectively overturn Roe v. Wade. Add to that threat Texas' extremist provisions, and we are faced with yet further reason for Congress to act urgently. My bill, the Women's Health Protection Act, would protect women's health through access to safe and legal abortion - no matter what extremist legislators try to do and no matter how the Supreme Court rules. #Healthcare no matter what.
**[In light of what's happening in Texas and around the country, I'm counting on 875 people to sign my petition urging Congress to pass the Women's Health Protection Act so we can defend reproductive health. Even if you've spoken out before, there is renewed urgency to speak out again and again and again. Please, sign on now.](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-dobbs?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fgrassroots-strategy-july-2021%3Fcode%3Djtk1057-su-nd)**
[ SIGN THE PETITION](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-dobbs?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fgrassroots-strategy-july-2021%3Fcode%3Djtk1057-su-nd)
As we've seen with Republican-led attacks to restrict voting rights, when extremist laws take hold in one state, they can spread like wildfire to others. Texas' sickening new maneuver will be a model for anti-choice legislators across the country, and that's why action at the federal level to block these extremist laws is so necessary.
If we do nothing, Texas is only the beginning. Our country could return to dark days where every single woman's personal decision about when to have a child is controlled by the government - back to the days where abortion care was driven underground and made unsafe.
I will fight with everything I have to prevent that from happening, but I need you to help me pass this vital legislation through Congress. **[Please, can I count on you to sign my petition now urging Congress to pass the Women's Health Protection Act? I'm counting on 875 team members to sign on before midnight to protect abortion access.](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-dobbs?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fgrassroots-strategy-july-2021%3Fcode%3Djtk1057-su-nd)**
[ SIGN THE PETITION](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-dobbs?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fgrassroots-strategy-july-2021%3Fcode%3Djtk1057-su-nd)
Thank you,
Dick
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1057-su-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

| Peter,

Last week, the Bucks won the NBA championship for the first time since 1971! This is huge for Milwaukee, and it shows that Wisconsin shouldn’t be counted out.

Not only did they bring home the title, but over the past year, this team started a powerful movement during an important moment in social and racial justice history.

The Bucks have been a championship team both on and off the court. Whether it was boycotting a playoff game last year to call on Wisconsin legislators to reconvene and address issues of police accountability and criminal justice reform, marching in the streets for Black lives, or leading efforts to register people to vote -- this is a team that all Wisconsinites can be proud of.

clean_body: Last week, the Bucks won the NBA championship for the first time since 1971! This is huge for Milwaukee, and it shows that Wisconsin shouldn’t be counted out. | | = | Peter, Last week, the Bucks won the NBA championship for the first time since 1971! This is huge for Milwaukee, and it shows that Wisconsin shouldn’t be counted out. Not only did they bring home the title, but over the past year, this team started a powerful movement during an important moment in social and racial justice history. The Bucks have been a championship team both on and off the court. Whether it was boycotting a playoff game last year to call on Wisconsin legislators to reconvene and address issues of police accountability and criminal justice reform, marching in the streets for Black lives, or leading efforts to register people to vote -- this is a team that all Wisconsinites can be proud of. = = This victory is for people all over Wisconsin - I hope this shows the country that Wisconsin should never be counted out. We’re here, and we’re ready to make history again and again. Let’s go Bucks! -Alex Lasry ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. Alex Lasry has a fresh perspective and record of actually getting things done. We can beat Ron Johnson by building a grassroots coalition, but it will take all of us. body:
#

**"We are on the verge of another great Republican comeback... and we are going to [win back the Senate] in 2022."**
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-hassan-july21?refcode=em210726-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1022_6688874_FA--uW&akid=1022%2E6688874%2EFA--uW)**
Hi there,
Mike Pence was in New Hampshire recently for a massive GOP fundraiser, and this quote has stayed with me.
Republicans only need to flip ONE seat to take back the Senate, and there’s no doubt my seat in New Hampshire and Mark Kelly’s in Arizona are their top targets.
[**We need a wave of grassroots support to help us fight back. Will you please split $3 between my campaign and Mark Kelly’s to help make up ground?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-hassan-july21?refcode=em210726-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1022_6688874_FA--uW&akid=1022%2E6688874%2EFA--uW)
Mitch McConnell, Mike Pence, and Donald Trump have a plan to flip the Senate. I won my race in 2016 by just 1,017 votes, and Mark Kelly’s win last November was one of the closest in the country. Nothing is guaranteed — that’s why your support is so important.
We don’t need Corporate PACs like Republicans to win, but we do need people like you to give $3 or what you can right now — before our deadline — to show our strength.
Your support is truly important to us, and we’re counting on your help. [**Will you please split $3 between Mark Kelly and me right now to protect our fragile Democratic Senate majority?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-hassan-july21?refcode=em210726-1-15&t=3&refcode2=1022_6688874_FA--uW&akid=1022%2E6688874%2EFA--uW)

body:
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33027538/297618277/217346270?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210726_1_1&refcode2=140782e9-5eee-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDA3ODJlOS01ZWVlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jztSQwOvp-1rrfj34c6kR1iA5gshLMzOve1Bfornhis=)

Friend,

I’m excited to announce that later this week, I’ll be packing up my car and setting out on a tour of all 72 counties in Wisconsin. This tour represents how I’ve won campaigns in the past: by meeting with anybody and everybody. We’re calling it the Full Nelson Tour and I can’t wait to get rolling!

Now, I’m not going to actually put anybody in a full nelson. But, when I get to the US Senate, I’m going to wrestle the corporate interests and billionaires who are harming Wisconsin’s working families to the ground.

**It’s well past time that Wall Street executives who seek to manipulate our government for profit, corporations that ship our jobs overseas, and billionaires who don’t pay their taxes get knocked out of the ring.**

However, driving across our beautiful state and visiting every single county ain’t cheap. Before I have the chance to meet Wisconsinites in their favorite diner, coffee shop, or watering hole we need to raise the resources necessary to get us across the state, from gas in the tank to buying a round of beer for everyone that shows up. _When I say everyone I truly mean everyone._

[That’s why I’m reaching out. Can you help us raise $13,500 — _the money needed to properly fund our tour —_ by Saturday at midnight? Any amount helps >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33027539/297618278/217346270?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210726_1_1&refcode2=140782e9-5eee-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDA3ODJlOS01ZWVlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jztSQwOvp-1rrfj34c6kR1iA5gshLMzOve1Bfornhis=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

This campaign will be a hell of a fight. But, I’ve spent my career fighting for the working people of Wisconsin, and I’m ready to defend them in Washington. Together we’ll:
* Enact Medicare for All
* Tackle systemic racism that makes Wisconsin one of the worst states for racial inequality
* Tax the billionaires and corporations getting away with paying nothing
* Put an end to the unfair trade deals that have hurt our communities from Milwaukee to Merrill
* Empower unions and workers and bring manufacturing back to Wisconsin
* Pass a Green New Deal
* End the filibuster
* Put Wisconsin over Wall Street
* And much, much more...

But before that, I need your help to ensure I can meet with as many Wisconsinites as possible during the Full Nelson Tour. [So with that, can you chip in before Saturday at midnight? All we need is a $3, $5, or $10 contribution from you. Chip in now:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33027552/297618291/217346270?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210726_1_1&refcode2=140782e9-5eee-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDA3ODJlOS01ZWVlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jztSQwOvp-1rrfj34c6kR1iA5gshLMzOve1Bfornhis=) | [Support the Full Nelson Tour](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33027554/297618293/217346270?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210726_1_1&refcode2=140782e9-5eee-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDA3ODJlOS01ZWVlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jztSQwOvp-1rrfj34c6kR1iA5gshLMzOve1Bfornhis=)

clean_body: | | = Friend, I’m excited to announce that later this week, I’ll be packing up my car and setting out on a tour of all 72 counties in Wisconsin. This tour represents how I’ve won campaigns in the past: by meeting with anybody and everybody. We’re calling it the Full Nelson Tour and I can’t wait to get rolling! Now, I’m not going to actually put anybody in a full nelson. But, when I get to the US Senate, I’m going to wrestle the corporate interests and billionaires who are harming Wisconsin’s working families to the ground. It’s well past time that Wall Street executives who seek to manipulate our government for profit, corporations that ship our jobs overseas, and billionaires who don’t pay their taxes get knocked out of the ring. However, driving across our beautiful state and visiting every single county ain’t cheap. Before I have the chance to meet Wisconsinites in their favorite diner, coffee shop, or watering hole we need to raise the resources necessary to get us across the state, from gas in the tank to buying a round of beer for everyone that shows up. When I say everyone I truly mean everyone. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = This campaign will be a hell of a fight. But, I’ve spent my career fighting for the working people of Wisconsin, and I’m ready to defend them in Washington. Together we’ll: Enact Medicare for All Tackle systemic racism that makes Wisconsin one of the worst states for racial inequality Tax the billionaires and corporations getting away with paying nothing Put an end to the unfair trade deals that have hurt our communities from Milwaukee to Merrill Empower unions and workers and bring manufacturing back to Wisconsin Pass a Green New Deal End the filibuster Put Wisconsin over Wall Street And much, much more... But before that, I need your help to ensure I can meet with as many Wisconsinites as possible during the Full Nelson Tour. = | = Thank you for stepping up, Tom Nelson JULY 28TH, 2021 TOM’S FIRST STOPS: Shawano County - 9 a.m. - Angie's Main Cafe, 132 S Main St, Shawano, WI 54166 - Marathon County - 11 a.m. - Whitewater Music Hall 130 1st St, Wausau, WI 54403 - Taylor County - 1 p.m. - McDonalds, 140 S 8th St, Medford, WI 54451 - Wood County - 3 p.m. - Biggby Coffee, 1710 N Central Ave, Marshfield, WI 54449 - Portage County - 5 p.m. - Father Fats Public House, 945 Clark St, Stevens Point, WI 54481 - Waupaca County - 7 p.m. - H. H. Hinder Brewing Company 804 Churchill St, Waupaca, WI 54981 - | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. The success of my friend, Monica De La Cruz Hernandez, will determine whether Republicans win back control of the House | [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=60a67dfc3edb451dbe312deaf6316cce&_e=INhdnkeekHtmviChd9n34svaZFDLxBP96d72t6m7YWHRpa1LH5vZG4fPCH_La82An2dijeFho-_dJXs_dDBvU8RENW_CBFmHhPQBqZDhfDTov34sNjzF_aCDvBx4wT2m2SbEzFWeJaaNudb9eIZKB_4337yfFVNdJ_ajpGauY9A9_5pm5N_45xLeYrfoR950JJs4PfiO8YXfG6G4jqph8Pv9KuNzmtP41e48emyePGnZ1K_zYynGdYF5w2vadbpv-pKTBJ5PUrY74oSxQTaOPIEXnlrZ1ySkT53Gv_lCboOPHFtGL1o092FuEphRAaJa2MIdxEZopdiCX-JfLS-EGdeeVKxAnG_CXfz0Z3X6F6RVAbzdz_SmeUlSnvTEjZdb84zaAluv1uhEoGxFyKZl-DmSlEEgj-brvxDEOtvYTwixmLOm1bVtPjwXO-UspaaxhM5ZMpd65cWS7jmRJ3xyJkstjAeNdk0bo02TuBsOxhQl8qC_KN8xi4FGXKhE0Yus)

Fellow patriot,

As a conservative, I know you’ll appreciate this. **History suggests that Republicans will take back the majority in the House in the 2022 midterm election** but we have one problem; the Left has never controlled the media quite like they do today.

To pull this off, we’ll need a team effort from conservatives everywhere, including you Fellow patriot. That’s why I need you to know about my fellow Texan, a conservative running for Congress, Monica De La Cruz Hernandez. **[If there’s ever been a candidate that deserves your support in this election, it’s Monica](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=60a67dfc3edb451dbe312deaf6316cce&_e=INhdnkeekHtmviChd9n34svaZFDLxBP96d72t6m7YWHRpa1LH5vZG4fPCH_La82An2dijeFho-_dJXs_dDBvU8RENW_CBFmHhPQBqZDhfDTov34sNjzF_aCDvBx4wT2m2SbEzFWeJaaNudb9eIZKB_4337yfFVNdJ_ajpGauY9A9_5pm5N_45xLeYrfoR950JJs4PfiO8YXfG6G4jqph8Pv9KuNzmtP41e48emyePGnZ1K_zYynGdYF5w2vadbpv-pKTBJ5PUrY74oSxQTaOPIEXnlrZ1ySkT53Gv_lCboPguX0hcHyojGgK1kKKMV-FcrL5lhv0zHaUtINK_tVQiG57Dx_Ft9-EzXK6VstrxCHwGKGxDL1mKSx2se6oBPcv6l99N8RuRSMZcK4kESO6OmwxCRVI_M1yIDUeb1QqHtid7RHyd9YFUkmOs069gm5gY3AnqhicxxHFHzwffPa87I_UC4yFrdLlbSRe5kWQjMpLO8ogaU8O8cGmfaGcGGx8)**.

In the 2020 election, Monica narrowly fell short of winning a congressional seat in South Texas, narrowly missing out on becoming the _first ever conservative Latina woman elected to Congress from her district_! When I say she narrowly lost, I mean it.**Monica fell short by just 6,588 votes – out of more than 228,000 votes cast -- and I think she’s got a real shot at winning this time around!**

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=60a67dfc3edb451dbe312deaf6316cce&_e=INhdnkeekHtmviChd9n34svaZFDLxBP96d72t6m7YWHRpa1LH5vZG4fPCH_La82An2dijeFho-_dJXs_dDBvU8RENW_CBFmHhPQBqZDhfDTov34sNjzF_aCDvBx4wT2m2SbEzFWeJaaNudb9eIZKB_4337yfFVNdJ_ajpGauY9A9_5pm5N_45xLeYrfoR950JJs4PfiO8YXfG6G4jqph8Pv9KuNzmtP41e48emyePGnZ1K_zYynGdYF5w2vadbpv-pKTBJ5PUrY74oSxQTaOPIEXnlrZ1ySkT53Gv_lCboO0nJRINPx34DzmIhll9PE0CR-Hfq4ah5VFTzFjUHkT--ncnm0fcu1Fwf_0RLbSR09jkDqygGC_Fdyu5eSaLRlSm9UYY0r4wdwv7Kcae0hDctOAEIomi2X_kpJf3SGqSC0MI3qpfnpjCG3jhlcHy-rO7CY-oA29FOg6Dyowt9qRQPCk0Q1pKCOAl9cf-JS7TyqP5-3qRon1GFJnnSm4fFrL)

**With the Democrats completely ignoring our border communities right now, Monica should be able to overcome the 6,000-vote deficit and if she does, she’ll play an instrumental role in the Republican Party re-establishing a House majority. And quite frankly, I’d be hard-pressed to think of a better spokesperson for border reform than someone who grew up on the border, still lives near the border, and knows the people most affected by DEMS lack of interest in border security.**

But none of this can happen without **[YOUR HELP](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=60a67dfc3edb451dbe312deaf6316cce&_e=INhdnkeekHtmviChd9n34svaZFDLxBP96d72t6m7YWHRpa1LH5vZG4fPCH_La82An2dijeFho-_dJXs_dDBvU8RENW_CBFmHhPQBqZDhfDTov34sNjzF_aCDvBx4wT2m2SbEzFWeJaaNudb9eIZKB_4337yfFVNdJ_ajpGauY9A9_5pm5N_45xLeYrfoR950JJs4PfiO8YXfG6G4jqph8Pv9KuNzmtP41e48emyePGnZ1K_zYynGdYF5w2vadbpv-pKTBJ5PUrY74oSxQTaOPIEXnlrZ1ySkT53Gv_lCboP6TCdJJd8qVXmpGwh8j5sdI7REsU1C76vyirezNPii0NOM49Ar9UbovG54ZdO0hTPefj9BQ8OFaVjtbWlzTiUPjF52-suWoDI4Uo3pyIXtMIR2_oJBDUK1cHvzr00UqLrZBIkHhIC_lZRJ-zoNW8BmekSTB7myaliXndTkMvP3w4NKW4ML9VkUFlbtAIf1HYIDCCazaamINvk3lohmnesq)**.

**[Can I count on you to support one of the strongest candidates I know? She has my full support, now I need my supporters to have her back too.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=60a67dfc3edb451dbe312deaf6316cce&_e=INhdnkeekHtmviChd9n34svaZFDLxBP96d72t6m7YWHRpa1LH5vZG4fPCH_La82An2dijeFho-_dJXs_dDBvU8RENW_CBFmHhPQBqZDhfDTov34sNjzF_aCDvBx4wT2m2SbEzFWeJaaNudb9eIZKB_4337yfFVNdJ_ajpGauY9A9_5pm5N_45xLeYrfoR950JJs4PfiO8YXfG6G4jqph8Pv9KuNzmtP41e48emyePGnZ1K_zYynGdYF5w2vadbpv-pKTBJ5PUrY74oSxQTaOPIEXnlrZ1ySkT53Gv_lCboN30DkcyHN4OkstBQGn7SOBMZ3KO8mpPO4jZ4XBNaDJOVaGDRT6hTR53ktd6MeReCOwrCcZrIrLmc9F7ZUWwO0XrPYUCWJ9iCcWzRhiAT9uuqpWdkKpxei_bdaNI9uFMMUUIwiAM_qwPl061VcaGIjvO3v3AQbLoa7G6zDpejAvq_Oa5Mw3P2Ud8G6h3gWbiVkducEdMz90OS7BR7TdtEDD)**

---

Like me, Monica is a strong proponent of equal opportunity but, equal outcomes on the other hand don’t come without hard work. She is truly one of the strongest and determined people that I know, and**I need her in Congress with me**. Monica knows the value of hard work and sacrifice firsthand. Raised by her mother in a South Texas border town, she didn’t have it easy growing up, but she was determined to achieve the American Dream

This is DOER, Monica is someone who knows how to GET THINGS DONE and she would make an **excellent addition** to Congress.

[**Republicans only need to pick up five seats to win back the House next year, can I get you to chip in $25, $50, maybe even $100 towards Monica’s campaign so she can help us take back the House majority?**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=60a67dfc3edb451dbe312deaf6316cce&_e=INhdnkeekHtmviChd9n34svaZFDLxBP96d72t6m7YWHRpa1LH5vZG4fPCH_La82An2dijeFho-_dJXs_dDBvU8RENW_CBFmHhPQBqZDhfDTov34sNjzF_aCDvBx4wT2m2SbEzFWeJaaNudb9eIZKB_4337yfFVNdJ_ajpGauY9A9_5pm5N_45xLeYrfoR950JJs4PfiO8YXfG6G4jqph8Pv9KuNzmtP41e48emyePGnZ1K_zYynGdYF5w2vadbpv-pKTBJ5PUrY74oSxQTaOPIEXnlrZ1ySkT53Gv_lCboOrz1wI0E59QZNSPI6hbgTpByY24n0uMP9oA5vavAEgejmyt32XuRjQfdmzsPL17DFy5D13t1IpycKBgeyry9bLFnn_19Wjscg-deR37HfT05yOH8VuE1hyYXWJdDYhV6Xmm3hlJD6z1AnOOfCsloo_zICvxAJVFtEVrwp97zDvGQkkmY2aRf2XwlWw1V4G2t1GDEeniOq4aZblQJMznIX0)

I’m grateful to have Monica as a friend and the American people would be extremely fortunate to have her as a Congresswoman. **I can say, without a doubt, that a win for Monica would be a win for Republicans and a win for the American people**.

[**HELP ME GET MONICA TO CONGRESS

body:
The 2nd Amendment is fundamental to maintaining the freedoms we enjoy. [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=eb22bbaaa5e94d5da2f422f96ebd357d&_e=HsIaD7JXWAaCWf1u6fbKa31xWDVzX_DfSZMsJxYKpxc6GDUW4dremOc9Cdbs50P87Wau6g9DEnB8F03O7lsIHXtGAKhmycup03K6SIqw3e_GEq1oTBkjkc2GOUcIY0q2JnKvY28hhOmtCQkWRtwQctEoNkBEQvzBEcPpFqT_5Hy3VT9of61jzYBTqIojlQN6hunTeQblLlbqoBTn40Is8gf7j7kDeQJ68i5WsW6p8gA0oFN1bJCJUy9Kn5kx9b3xBu2bGzKyw1CipQYWVTOz51HdPD426DKSzrqh1vWY-PX2S18Btjk0wWw6LMJF917ec0ZUncF3_nL7AANxxo1UWHLZeYFWvu9Nz_JJSWcQ_5GGFLThcDDDBURp9Mlddn3N0q6Pn75Vn3zkpytNxEfsgA%3D%3D) | |

Peter,
Joe Biden declared war on the 2nd Amendment.

A full firearms ban is the Democrats' ultimate goal, but they are slowly chipping away at all aspects of gun ownership.

Instead of blaming the failing policies of the decaying, liberal cities where gun violence has exploded in the past year, Biden and his fellow Democrats blame the guns themselves.

Just this past weekend in the city of Chicago, a city where gun laws are strict, **12 people were shot dead and over 70 were wounded** , yet the mainstream media remains silent and provides cover for a large liberal city.

During a recent CNN town hall propaganda segment, Biden claimed 9mm pistols are “assault weapons” and expressed his desire to ban them.
[**FIGHT BIDEN’S GUN GRAB**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=eb22bbaaa5e94d5da2f422f96ebd357d&_e=HsIaD7JXWAaCWf1u6fbKa31xWDVzX_DfSZMsJxYKpxc6GDUW4dremOc9Cdbs50P87Wau6g9DEnB8F03O7lsIHXtGAKhmycup03K6SIqw3e_GEq1oTBkjkc2GOUcIY0q2JnKvY28hhOmtCQkWRtwQctEoNkBEQvzBEcPpFqT_5Hy3VT9of61jzYBTqIojlQN61V0lYBNb8-hqWFEZffeEHE_8Ar-hzz1cxwQD_8oi7E-fSB72CMKAeeib4uhgBJCJZiFiVTU9zZjqijQlwlalQUirFMLFOJp3DfaEZud3YGjwb5qF9m1cd7tCHBg_BjWCinqYVQpsWvL8h9GqMqKuGeBFjw21fSZAyK_ocC-IeknjD9C9GMCwf1a3gwISLdSF6mQgYboncLW8RYGSLQa-TQ%3D%3D)
Biden said, “I’m the only guy that ever got passed legislation when I was a senator, that made sure we eliminated assault weapons... The idea you need a weapon that can have the ability to fire 20, 30, 40, 50, 120 shots from that weapon — whether it’s a — **whether it’s a 9-millimeter pistol or whether it’s a rifle — is ridiculous**.”

The only thing ridiculous is Biden wanting to limit magazines to 10 rounds, which **SEVERELY** infringes on law-abiding citizens’ ability to protect themselves and their families.

**The 2nd Amendment is fundamental to maintaining the freedoms we enjoy! **

Biden is wrong about so many things, but his views on the 2nd Amendment may be the **WORST**.

I’ll continue to fight against his Unconstitutional gun grab!
[**FIGHT BIDEN’S GUN GRAB >>>**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=eb22bbaaa5e94d5da2f422f96ebd357d&_e=HsIaD7JXWAaCWf1u6fbKa31xWDVzX_DfSZMsJxYKpxc6GDUW4dremOc9Cdbs50P87Wau6g9DEnB8F03O7lsIHXtGAKhmycup03K6SIqw3e_GEq1oTBkjkc2GOUcIY0q2JnKvY28hhOmtCQkWRtwQctEoNkBEQvzBEcPpFqT_5Hy3VT9of61jzYBTqIojlQN65zBOTZb62e9yEDJ_R0qU4-B_Hq4HdjlOBkOO8tjYDAIZg6mzZ0-3_n1LHO5tY_JX7sxugadNyt6UeYlHjYecXHWOpz1VcZw1lG7rsTejg1WeBpTkTmNB-IQ6Z-4C5oFc7bZ0QKrOENBLvbgnVPoV23sI7U9c6Ypss2FOdyKoFDUPj2rA0pVM4Iwr9gQGOyEVfV_rW-Mky4aaem5_TPVgYQ%3D%3D)

God Bless,

Josh

clean_body: I just got out of a meeting with my fundraising team this morning where we reviewed our numbers, and this can’t wait. The month is over in just a coup | Fellow Conservative, I just got out of a meeting with our fundraising team this morning where we reviewed our numbers, and this can’t wait. You may be wondering why hitting these fundraising goals are so important when I will not be up for reelection for a few more years. Well quite frankly, it takes years to build a robust fundraising program needed to take on the Democrats and their dark-money donors... Not to mention, we need to be investing in the upcoming critical U.S. Senate races across the country in the coming months, doing everything we can to take back the Senate for Republicans in the Midterm Election and STOPPING the Senate Democrats’ radical liberal agenda. I need your support every single day to reach these goals and have the resources needed to defeat Chuck Schumer and reclaim our Republican majority in the U.S. Senate. | | | | | | The best way to defeat the Democrats is by putting up huge fundraising numbers and building the foundation NOW to take on the Democrat Machine. Will you pledge your support before midnight tonight with a donation? We couldn’t do it with you, Fellow Conservative. Thanks, Senator Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. mailto:info@stevedaines.com | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana Don't want to receive our emails?

Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-N.Y.), Congressional Progressive Caucus chair Pramila Jayapal and rising star freshman Sara Jacobs (D-Calif.).” -Punchbowl News Sara is the only freshman member on Speaker Pelosi’s newly announced select committee and has accomplished so much in her short time in Congress on crucial issues including child care and child poverty, infrastructure, and rebuilding America’s standing around the world. We’re so proud that all her hard work on behalf of California and all American families is getting noticed. With redistricting and an expected shuffle in House seats, we’re doing everything we can to make sure Sara stays in Congress and to help keep a Democratic majority. = | = Thank you, Team Sara * | | = Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States | = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: The Biden Gun Grab
body:
| | | | Biden wants to eliminate 9mm handguns?
---
---
Dear Peter,
President Biden may have forgotten to stay quiet about his true intentions regarding our guns at a CNN town hall the other day.
"...whether it's a 9-millimeter pistol or whether it's a rifle, is ridiculous. I'm continuing to push to eliminate the sale of those things." - President Biden
_**It seems that the Biden Gun Grab**_ _**is real.**_
As one of the leading Attorneys General fighting to block Biden's aggressive gun restrictions, I want to promise patriots like yourself, Peter, that I WILL SUE the Biden Administration if they dare try to make this unconstitutional idea a reality.
With the House and Senate lost to the far-left, it is up to Attorneys General like myself to hold the line in this one-party town.
[_**And I will hold the line -- but I need your help. Would you chip in $25 to help support our efforts?**_](http://url8766.teammorrisey.com/ls/click?upn=1Tdwy4hnuy5QvBqgHcrNA5vUG4XtYCytxd-2FFkvwO8mgL73IQWR7SBLnFsngROzMe-2BULYzadsBWMEriCNKEGPte9wzpfc3-2BRR477jZUsyh3E-3DZDyB_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6sRKgoIsrycbz4i-2B-2F7ROw-2BiTWkn3GxeKQylJKab0ayiOKVz0NsA1TWAQ3kHIvuE7WocPmesuMN6JaDz7dJhXDDPN-2BG790gnf6zvlp6kjPetepNG-2BbtpKK5EDCJa2lM-2F7x3YQsBA7e0Ch6SHKKC664S8lHEiaNpiIE09dMWGWFeEZCyl9PnDVK1iTw12fy7vXkLsXJrFBUZnOytBvqaK-2B5UrepmOsXj72-2FmTk76T2-2BZ3w55w0R1IOQ1PK4iFf0OkmPMfly8IM-2Bba-2FR9YwyylLrYSxS-2FQVHgPU2wZ1WwWVIKNzDZUkU0vfRE4Ffm71oG378O1FQi1MRuQklD1K9hfxbg7RDv2jIgQsxXXjbff0VINC0NcGm-2FbJ1jx5zPbX2z-2F8eY6b4mAY-2BODIDhp-2B-2Byne-2FCZa10X1JEKCq2spCZPdtXh24O5N7RuroKZfGBNaF35yVweDzFolDSSIABy1Ac2H-2BTKgyOkfpFa8XDda909t7jtGDfkx-2BjBn7FI34p7bF2YIvr-2Bxws-2F57lQGwEfaZP5JZ6VRWc06psiTX5Y0MDUbGrghArIG8tJhCGwhRGj7yVPi7xgnlCbRuSCNY763mYoH7WsLh4mg0E9Sx6sR8tmeSrhU5Ksqshzevg0Vv2Y4PXw86doWNfZz-2FxQxwDZJs5-2Fj-2FgZ4fZPxOE3YQ-2FgNiS1P-2FfhWl-2BBm0M6eco3mwDVqaI0mJM4UfsxNwnENQBbGRGBdi04GfrREIGOwjgSSoqXVL1r2TL0AoYEf5-2Btlvv2zN8iKburJSYGqhs9Rbzja2XuLiYugwcjvx9NSE4e8nBfp1yY2ZfYdRhP-2Fj2QHPYYUIKDfZozOF9tbPb-2FYKSyHz29ff1Q-3D-3D)

"...whether it's a 9-millimeter pistol or whether it's a rifle, is ridiculous. I'm continuing to push to eliminate the sale of those things." - President Biden It seems that the Biden Gun Grab is real. As one of the leading Attorneys General fighting to block Biden's aggressive gun restrictions, I want to promise patriots like yourself, Peter, that I WILL SUE the Biden Administration if they dare try to make this unconstitutional idea a reality. Hello, I’d prefer not to email asking for money for my reelection campaign, but Democrats will lose our Senate majority if I lose - and a new WMUR poll shows me behind. Winning in a swing state like New Hampshire is both hard and expensive. I only won my last race by 1,017 votes, and Mike Pence and Mitch McConnell are already rallying Republicans here for the next election. **The money we raise now is vital for inoculating against the misleading attacks the GOP is already lobbing our way.** **I wouldn’t ask if this wasn’t important:** **[Please donate $5 or as much as you can to help protect New Hampshire’s vulnerable Senate seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33028018/297619379/-846459524?refcode=e20210726_mwh-sc&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTM4MDVlNi02MGVlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZpXW5CGtamYIlN0w9VBWvq72YwZqkGxGucl7USAFALk=)** It’s not just Senate control on the line. **The future of the Supreme Court is at stake too.** Mitch McConnell has promised that if Republicans take back the Senate majority, he’ll refuse to consider any of President Biden’s Supreme Court nominees. With Donald Trump’s three ultra-conservative justices already skewing the balance of the Court, that’s not a chance we can afford to take. **[I’m counting on your help, please. Rush $5 or whatever you can right now to help win in New Hampshire, save the Senate majority, and protect the future of the Supreme Court.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33028019/297619380/-846459524?refcode=e20210726_mwh-sc&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTM4MDVlNi02MGVlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZpXW5CGtamYIlN0w9VBWvq72YwZqkGxGucl7USAFALk=)** Thank you very much. With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Team Derek
subject: Are you surprised by this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Can you help us meet our monthly goal?

Hi Peter,

The Republican party is spending their time right now voting against protections for everyday people.
They’re voting against clean water and against protecting people like you from corporate fraud and deception. We’re not surprised though. After all, that’s a prime example of the corrupting factor of taking donations from special interest groups on full display.

This is why we need your help meeting our July goal. **Our campaign is refusing big-dollar corporate PACs—we’re relying on** [**$5 here and $20 there donations from people just like you. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33028926/297621821/474536728?refcode=07-26-21&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGE0ZDg1MS02NGVlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nSTZXW-95bpfYVa8EO_9LEenYliSD3PRhE3kujVOrMs=)

Politics shouldn’t be about catering to the desires of the wealthy few. It’s about listening to the needs of the people and creating a better society that works for all of us.

We’re going knocking on every door and talking to every person in our community that is struggling just to get by—from the small business owner that’s being forced to close-up shop, to the new parent that just lost their job so the CEO can keep increasing their pay.

These conversations are possible because of people like you. [**Can you chip in $5 or $20 to help us in our fight to give the people a voice in Congress? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33028927/297621822/474536728?refcode=07-26-21&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGE0ZDg1MS02NGVlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nSTZXW-95bpfYVa8EO_9LEenYliSD3PRhE3kujVOrMs=)
In Solidarity,
**Team Derek**

Our campaign is refusing big-dollar corporate PACs—we’re relying on = Politics shouldn’t be about catering to the desires of the wealthy few. It’s about listening to the needs of the people and creating a better society that works for all of us. We’re going knocking on every door and talking to every person in our community that is struggling just to get by—from the small business owner that’s being forced to close-up shop, to the new parent that just lost their job so the CEO can keep increasing their pay. These conversations are possible because of people like you. = In Solidarity, Team Derek * = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • (760) 486-2416

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Senate Update: After the Rescue Plan, Building Back Better
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501153144%2501100541%2b-%2b07-26-2021%2beNewsletter%250115433.28048071.5361925.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501153144%2501100541%2b-%2b07-26-2021%2beNewsletter%250115433.28048071.5361925.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501)
---|---
| | | **July 26, 2021** |
---|---|---|---
| | |
### Bringing Federal Support to Maryland
In March, the Senate passed and President Biden signed into law the American Rescue Plan, taking big, bold action to meet the urgency of this moment by prioritizing resources to defeat the pandemic and putting our state and our country squarely on the road to recovery. It was a historic win for the nation and for Maryland. For the past four months, federal funds have been providing desperately-needed support to our workers, small businesses, families, schools, and communities. These funds have already gone directly toward preventing a wave of home evictions, keeping restaurants afloat, [assisting families with disabilities](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15433.28048071.5361925.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fmaryland-congressional-delegation-announces-nearly-54-million-in-american-rescue-plan-funding-to-support-children-with-disabilities&redir_log=608846182971296), ensuring our [Head Start](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15433.28048071.5361925.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fmaryland-congressional-delegation-announces-more-than-10-million-in-american-rescue-plan-funding-for-head-start-programs-across-the-state&redir_log=116724201271330) programs can operate to provide early education, bolstering child care, and much more.

And on July 15th, we marked another very important moment for both our country's economic comeback and for our larger mission to support middle-income and working-class families across the country with the launch of new monthly Child Tax Credit payments to tens of millions of American families who are paying the bills to support their kids. This measure, which we included in the American Rescue Plan, covers almost 60 million children and will cut child poverty nearly in half this year. This expanded Child Tax Credit has been increased to $3,000 per child between the ages of six and seventeen and $3,600 per child under six years old - and half of this amount will be provided in monthly payments to families from now through the end of this year. That provision alone will benefit more than 1.1 million children in families throughout Maryland and lift 52,000 of them out of poverty. I hosted a [roundtable discussion](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15433.28048071.5361925.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2fvideos%2f911802912743102&redir_log=941959987938391) with community leaders to discuss what this means for families in Maryland - and the importance of making this tax credit expansion permanent going forward. For more information on the new expansion of the Child Tax Credit, visit [https://www.vanhollen.senate.gov/coronavirus](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15433.28048071.5361925.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fcoronavirus&redir_log=01808124502318).

The American Rescue Plan also extended federal emergency unemployment insurance through the first week in September to help those workers who are still struggling to get back on their feet and into the workforce. Governor Hogan's decision to abruptly cut off these unemployment benefits threatened thousands of struggling Maryland families with financial ruin. 140,000 Marylanders would have lost their unemployment benefits completely, while more than 40,000 others would see their benefits cut by $300 per week. Not only did it thrust thousands of Maryland families into unnecessary uncertainty, it also risked reducing the strength of our economic recovery by needlessly forfeiting over one billion dollars in federal resources that would be spent by Marylanders purchasing goods and services at Maryland businesses. Fortunately, the Maryland Circuit Court [ruled against the Governor's decision - a ruling which was then upheld by the Maryland Court of Appeals, our state's highest court](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15433.28048071.5361925.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2f07%2f12%2f2021%2fvan-hollen-statement-on-circuit-court-ruling-to-maintain-marylanders-extended-unemployment-benefits&redir_log=464752840481145) - affirming Maryland law and protecting this vital lifeline. Over 180,000 Marylanders can now breathe a sigh of relief, but it shouldn't have required a court decision to save these important benefits.
---
### Building Our 21st Century Infrastructure, Expanding Workforce Opportunities, and Cutting the Costs Faced by American Households
I am pleased with the progress we have made with the Biden Administration over the last six months, but we have much more to do to enact the "Better" part of the "Build Back Better" agenda. That includes enacting a 21st-century infrastructure package to put millions of Americans to work modernizing and expanding everything from transit, roads, and bridges to connecting every American with high-speed internet, to building a clean energy economy to confront the accelerating costs and devastation wrought by climate change. We are working to achieve much of this goal through bipartisan legislation.

As we modernize the physical backbone of our economy, we must also dramatically expand educational and workforce opportunities for every American and cut the costs of everything from health care to child care. I was proud to partner with my Democratic colleagues on the Senate Budget Committee to roll out [our framework to do just that](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15433.28048071.5361925.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-senate-budget-democrats-announce-framework-to-invest-in-american-workers-families&redir_log=091947095421025). This initial proposal, combined with the bipartisan infrastructure plan, includes all key elements of President Biden's American Jobs Plan and American Families Plan - along with additional measures to reduce health care costs and expand access to quality, affordable health care.

Together, these initiatives lay the groundwork for advancing a number of key priorities I've been fighting for, including upgrading our roads, bridges, tunnels, rail and transit systems, and waterways. We must also restore communities that have been torn apart by past projects by removing barriers like the Highway to Nowhere in West Baltimore. Our budget framework also includes additional measures to ensure universal early education; make workforce training and college more affordable; reduce prescription drug costs; expand Medicare to cover dental, hearing, and vision services; extend the vital Child Tax Credits in the American Rescue Plan; and invest in a clean energy future that will create millions of home-grown, good-paying jobs. I'm committed to working to pass this bold plan in the Congress so we can strengthen our country and build a brighter future for every American.
### Holding USPS Accountable
Over many months, I've heard from thousands of constituents about slow postal delivery. Medication shipments have gone missing, small businesses can't get products to customers, and people are getting hit with late fees for bill payments that didn't arrive on time. The situation is doubly frustrating because the Congress allocated an additional $10 billion to the Postal Service to help meet its needs during the pandemic. For some, things have gotten better. But far too many are still waiting on the mail, and the performance of the U.S. Postal Service in Maryland is among the worst in the nation. This is unacceptable.

That's why this month, as the new Chairman of the Appropriations Subcommittee on Financial Services and General Government, I organized a [Senate hearing](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15433.28048071.5361925.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.appropriations.senate.gov%2fhearings%2fa-hearing-to-review-the-fy-2022-budget-request-for-the-usps-office-of-inspector-general-and-usps-service-issues-&redir_log=530443220061104) to focus on this problem. At that hearing, the USPS Inspector General Tammy Whitcomb confirmed that the drastic changes made last year by Trump's Postmaster General, Louis DeJoy, helped cause the mail delays we've all been experiencing for the past year. In addition to IG Whitcomb, I invited three Marylanders to testify: Brian McLaurin, a postal worker from Forest Heights, Maryland, who talked about how management changes have slowed down the mail; Rania Dima, a resident of Frederick, Maryland, who detailed how USPS delays have impacted her and other members of the blind community; and Karen Meyers, a small business owner and resident of Baltimore, Maryland, who discussed the impact that USPS delays have had on her business and on Baltimore residents. Their testimony showed clearly the real harm these delays are causing and underscored a fact we've long known to be true: we must get rid of Postmaster General DeJoy and work urgently to revive the Postal Service. I am also pleased that the IG has launched a special investigation into postal delays in the Baltimore area, which have been especially severe.
### Tackling the Gun Violence Epidemic
Tackling gun violence in our communities requires all hands on deck. There is no single cause of the gun violence that has plagued our cities - and to meet these challenges we need an all-of-government and all-of-community response. As part of that vital effort, Senator Cardin and I, together with members of our Baltimore area congressional delegation, [met](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15433.28048071.5361925.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1414779125865369601&redir_log=245240449505374) with Baltimore Mayor Brandon M. Scott, Police Commissioner Michael Harrison, and Acting U.S. Attorney Jonathan Lenzner to discuss how we can work at all levels of government to reduce gun violence in our neighborhoods.

Our meeting coincided with a similar discussion hosted by President Biden with local leaders from around the country on this very issue. I'm glad that the President has already released a [comprehensive strategy](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15433.28048071.5361925.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-cardin-praise-biden-administration-commitments-to-combat-gun-crime-and-enhance-public-safety&redir_log=520177652881096) to prevent and respond to gun violence and bolster public safety. I look forward to working with various federal agencies to implement the Biden Administration's strategy and ensure that Maryland receives the federal resources that it needs, including funds for community-based violence prevention programs. Congress must also do its part by renewing the ban on assault weapons and prohibiting high-capacity magazines - and should enact legislation to create a universal background check system for firearms. I'm also pushing to pass my [Handgun Purchaser Licensing Act](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15433.28048071.5361925.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-raskin-lead-introduction-of-permit-to-purchase-gun-safety-bill&redir_log=946165220777886), which would incentivize states to pass their own permit-to-purchase laws like the one we have in Maryland. States require licenses to drive a car in order to protect public safety - requiring a license to buy a handgun should be a no-brainer. It has been proven that these laws can dramatically reduce homicides and save lives. While we have such a law in Maryland, our state is not an island. More than half of the guns used in crimes in Maryland come from outside our state. That's why it's crucial that we pass these gun safety bills to cover the rest of the country.

The Senate should also swiftly confirm David Chipman, President Biden's nominee for permanent Director of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF), and Congress should give ATF the resources it needs to stem the illegal trafficking of firearms - as laid out in my [AIM Act](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15433.28048071.5361925.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-beyer-introduce-legislation-to-improve-atf-strengthen-gun-violence-prevention&redir_log=070606294721002). These actions should be coupled with meaningful police reform legislation, including the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act. We must get this done. All these efforts are critical to our larger mission of ensuring true public safety in our communities.

In many ways, the next few months will determine whether we can enact the Build Back Better agenda that President Biden outlined in his campaign. These will also be critical months in our fight to save our democracy from the ongoing efforts of many state legislatures to erect barriers to voting. Your continued vigilance and engagement are essential to the success of our democracy. Thanks for being a partner in that important work.

[I hope you'll continue to participate in shaping our future together.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15433.28048071.5361925.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fcontact&redir_log=475918421268285)
Chris Van Hollen

[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15433.28048071.5361925.7517223&report_id=Facebook&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=328155479639284 "Facebook")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15433.28048071.5361925.7517223&report_id=Twitter&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen&redir_log=957640916473241 "Twitter")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15433.28048071.5361925.7517223&report_id=Instagram&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.instagram.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=389295287187292 "Instagram")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15433.28048071.5361925.7517223&report_id=YouTube&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fuser%2fRepChrisVanHollen&redir_log=463627374976326 "YouTube")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15433.28048071.5361925.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fmedium.com%2f%40ChrisVanHollen&redir_log=575666539451239)
|
---

name: Phil Arballo
subject: This would mean a lot to me, Peter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Arballo For Congress P
body:
We can defeat Nunes and all the dirty money interests bankrolling campaigns, but it’s going to take a groundswell of grassroots support.

| **Text JOIN to 25002 to receive special text message updates from our campaign!**
Message & data rates may apply.
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33029297/297623353/145944154?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjMwNGQzNS02NWVlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JdYLvjbrWRcwg3vS6kY9e535xrWlXM8rzumQsQQo_-w=)
**Peter, I have a personal request:** **[Will you sign on to endorse my campaign against MAGA Republican Devin Nunes? It’s ambitious, but my team and I want to see 2,500 more Democratic endorsers by midnight »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33029300/297623362/1060055702?refcode=PAFC_20210726_EMPET_E1_T1_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjMwNGQzNS02NWVlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JdYLvjbrWRcwg3vS6kY9e535xrWlXM8rzumQsQQo_-w=&emci=c8cbeb74-43ee-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=8b304d35-65ee-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1755436)**
**I need 2,500 Democrats to join my movement by midnight:** | [SIGN ON NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33029302/297623364/1060055702?refcode=PAFC_20210726_EMPET_E1_T1_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjMwNGQzNS02NWVlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JdYLvjbrWRcwg3vS6kY9e535xrWlXM8rzumQsQQo_-w=&emci=c8cbeb74-43ee-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=8b304d35-65ee-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1755436)
---
I know I tell you this a lot, Peter, but I want to hammer this point home:

**_Unlike Devin Nunes, I don’t rely on corporate PACs to run this campaign._**

I rely on grassroots Democrats like you, Peter, who know California deserves better and believe in our progressive message.

**California _deserves_ a fighter in Congress. Yet corrupt MAGA Nunes and his ultra-rich donors stand in the way of real change.**

name: Rand Paul
subject: Dr. Fauci LIED again, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
**It 's time for Dr. Fauci to find another job.** **[Chip in if you agree!>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58015330:Jxcl39lNv:m:1:3253819041:C4FBC0920D7FCF2625DC6325E31929A1:r)** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58015330:Jxcl39lNv:m:1:3253819041:C4FBC0920D7FCF2625DC6325E31929A1:r) | |
---
Peter,

On May 11th, Dr. Fauci lied to our faces.

He came to the Senate and told us that the NIH absolutely did not fund gain of function research.

That simply isn't true and I gave Dr. Fauci the chance to retract his statements in our Senate hearing today.

No surprise, he stood by his lies.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58015330:Jxcl39lNv:m:1:3253819041:C4FBC0920D7FCF2625DC6325E31929A1:r)
[**WATCH NOW >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58015330:Jxcl39lNv:m:1:3253819041:C4FBC0920D7FCF2625DC6325E31929A1:r)
It's never been more clear that Dr. Fauci believes he's invincible. He believes our strong bureaucracy and his corrupt allies in Congress will defend him till the end. He thinks he can avoid accountability completely.

_I'm doing everything to prove him wrong. _

I'm leading the charge to #FIREFAUCI and hold him accountable for lying to Congress, misleading the public, and for his well-documented role in providing funds to the Wuhan Lab in China so they can create bioweapons like COVID-19.

Will you join my fight by chipping in now?

**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**STAND WITH RAND: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58015330:Jxcl39lNv:m:1:3253819041:C4FBC0920D7FCF2625DC6325E31929A1:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $15**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58015330:Jxcl39lNv:m:1:3253819041:C4FBC0920D7FCF2625DC6325E31929A1:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $10**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58015330:Jxcl39lNv:m:1:3253819041:C4FBC0920D7FCF2625DC6325E31929A1:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $5**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58015330:Jxcl39lNv:m:1:3253819041:C4FBC0920D7FCF2625DC6325E31929A1:r)
**If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**

Dr. Fauci has proven time and time again that he has no idea what he's doing.

He's not an expert in COVID. He's an expert in political theater!

You can see that every time he's in front of the microphone.

* He still says he doesn't know the role China played in the pandemic.
* He denies he supported gain of function research despite the paper trail that _proves he did._
* He claims to "trusts the science" but repeatedly denies it in favor of theatrics and dramatic attacks.

He dances around it, but we know the truth. We've seen the documents. We've read the emails. We've watched the COVID hysteria unfold over the past 18 months.

Not only was he flat-out wrong about the virus, but he's also continuously lied to the American public and demonstrated poor judgment.

ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. It's time for Fauci TO GO.

**That's why I'm putting my foot down and if you agree I hope you'll chip in now:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2615210-raf/ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58015330:Jxcl39lNv:m:1:3253819041:C4FBC0920D7FCF2625DC6325E31929A1:r)**

I have been fighting to dismiss Fauci for a while now, but I know more than ever I can't do it alone.

I need to show strength and support against the Fauci-loving bureaucracy. **[Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58015330:Jxcl39lNv:m:1:3253819041:C4FBC0920D7FCF2625DC6325E31929A1:r)

**
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Sharif Street for PA
subject: Fighting for farmers in PA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARIF STREET FOR PA
body:
Our summer tour across the Commonwealth brought us to Centre County Thursday and Pittsburgh on Saturday, and continues to confirm what we’ve known all along: Whether its access to health care, gun violence, mass incarceration or climate change, the same issues are as much of a concern in our rural and suburban communities as they are in our urban cities. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33030648/297626698/902632477?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjZkMGFkYS02YWVlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OJSkm5u94QPYOaa-1nXJ0g6GJ9lZ8HL6UeCdmgi_pv8=&emci=e341da66-f2eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a66d0ada-6aee-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15053672) | Our summer tour across the Commonwealth brought us to Centre County Thursday and Pittsburgh on Saturday, and continues to confirm what we’ve known all along: Whether its access to health care, gun violence, mass incarceration or climate change, the same issues are as much of a concern in our rural and suburban communities as they are in our urban cities. In State College, folks wanted to discuss how the low price of milk is hurting our dairy farming, an industry that puts people to work in almost every county in Pennsylvania. In Pittsburgh, I participated in a panel on gun violence and mass incarceration--two topics I find myself speaking about both much too often, and yet, not enough. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33030649/297626699/466275692?refcode=E10357-20210723-Tour-Boalsburg-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjZkMGFkYS02YWVlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OJSkm5u94QPYOaa-1nXJ0g6GJ9lZ8HL6UeCdmgi_pv8=)** A major factor depressing milk prices is a federal regulation limiting calories in beverages served in public schools. Whole milk exceeds the allowed calorie limit, therefore school districts have stopped purchasing milk. This is not only hurting our dairy industry, but undermining the nutrition of school children everywhere, who are no longer served milk with their lunch. It is as much a problem for our urban cities as it is for our farming regions. These issues are not as different as you may think. Milk prices are depressed because the calories in whole milk exceed federal regulations on the calorie count for beverages served in public schools. School districts have stopped purchasing milk, hurting not only our dairy industry, but undermining the nutrition of school children who are no longer provided with milk in schools. It is as much a problem for our urban cities as it is for our farming regions and could be solved with a federal waiver for milk. Gun violence is as much a problem in Lancaster and Reading as it is in Philadelphia or Pittsburgh. It could be solved with federal gun safety legislation. Finally, it did not surprise me at all that voters in Boalsburg were as concerned about the devastating toll mass incarceration is taking on our communities as were the people in Pittsburgh. We are one Commonwealth, united by so much more than divides us. We are all struggling, and the focus on partisanship over problem solving is hurting all of us. I was able to work with my colleagues in Harrisburg on legislation that allowed school districts to purchase milk. A common sense solution to a common problem impacting communities across the Commonwealth. This is the record of bipartisan accomplishment I would take to Washington as your next U.S. Senator. **[One issue where I’ve not been able to make progress with my GOP colleagues in Harrisburg is gun safety. We’re going to need federal legislation to stop the bloodshed in Pennsylvania, and that’s why I’m asking for your support. Help me reach the Senate by chipping in $10 or more today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33030650/297626700/466275692?refcode=E10357-20210723-Tour-Boalsburg-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjZkMGFkYS02YWVlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OJSkm5u94QPYOaa-1nXJ0g6GJ9lZ8HL6UeCdmgi_pv8=)** [DONATE TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33030651/297626701/466275692?refcode=E10357-20210723-Tour-Boalsburg-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjZkMGFkYS02YWVlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OJSkm5u94QPYOaa-1nXJ0g6GJ9lZ8HL6UeCdmgi_pv8=) \-- Sharif Street for PA
