name: Chief James Craig
subject: why Detroit didn’t burn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58015631:JSTka9lEN:m:1:3253819041:7910E0E34B73AB6129964E5B14B9A82B:r) | |
---
Peter,

Last summer, Portland burned. Seattle, Minneapolis, Atlanta. Even some cities in Michigan...

But not Detroit.

Why?

**I'm Chief James Craig, former Detroit Police Chief - and I know why Detroit didn't burn.**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58015631:JSTka9lEN:m:1:3253819041:7910E0E34B73AB6129964E5B14B9A82B:r)

[**WATCH A SPECIAL MESSAGE FROM CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58015631:JSTka9lEN:m:1:3253819041:7910E0E34B73AB6129964E5B14B9A82B:r)
See, I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs.

I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened.

The police retreated, and let their city burn.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

But there's more to the "why?" than that.

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city.

I was the first in that day, leading from the front.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58015631:JSTka9lEN:m:1:3253819041:7910E0E34B73AB6129964E5B14B9A82B:r)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, _**Detroit did not burn.**_

That's the why.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**So, I'm opening an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. **

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead From the Front donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of our team from the beginning.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58015631:JSTka9lEN:m:1:3253819041:7910E0E34B73AB6129964E5B14B9A82B:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58015631:JSTka9lEN:m:1:3253819041:7910E0E34B73AB6129964E5B14B9A82B:r)

[**DONATE NOW
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58015631:JSTka9lEN:m:1:3253819041:7910E0E34B73AB6129964E5B14B9A82B:r)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

_**And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!"**_

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front, rather than ruling us like a queen.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58015631:JSTka9lEN:m:1:3253819041:7910E0E34B73AB6129964E5B14B9A82B:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58015632:JSTka9lEN:m:1:3253819041:7910E0E34B73AB6129964E5B14B9A82B:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58015633:JSTka9lEN:m:1:3253819041:7910E0E34B73AB6129964E5B14B9A82B:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58015634:JSTka9lEN:m:1:3253819041:7910E0E34B73AB6129964E5B14B9A82B:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58015635:JSTka9lEN:m:1:3253819041:7910E0E34B73AB6129964E5B14B9A82B:r)
_**If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically.**_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58015631:JSTka9lEN:m:1:3253819041:7910E0E34B73AB6129964E5B14B9A82B:r)

Chief James Craig

Former Detroit Police Chief

P.S. I'm not a politician, I'm a police officer. I'm starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated: **[https://secure.winred.com/james-craig-for-governor-exploratory-committee/action-166204](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58015631:JSTka9lEN:m:1:3253819041:7910E0E34B73AB6129964E5B14B9A82B:r)**

name: Cicely Davis
subject: I’m Running Against Ilhan Omar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CICELY DAVIS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=00a91feebb8d439a9e991cca89bc8376&_e=PXZeaPUbbKeP4hM5gPYGvW5n9qMA9mf_BUwCu5scbHwZtW5sAGjWkWyTrTbGSdbSvfkP3KO0eVFx4OZRzRteD3sHcFQPI6F1wMh9im0hULnU_LV-pXDD-RX3nXrboWU2boONyUQPQ4OoL5yXEpr33IkBUPhdjPKIrHoWWbELwQws6mJv4HO0PrYwY-78GXY_MGnAOpqlDfq4tT_Wms-ZBp8yrnlK25MCgZGc2Ns3XVUtSDEjlMiYm0BNQ_XLeCFeZrXVVrK2-QYD_CLJw0kbjYRNeabP5rU4eiiFaU5m7eeiEnNrn-6cQ84pRS1SBjGrBuWrBRJpwx3142sCJWEioGwwVO7p3KFfUaZCqB1n2X5dUaRGAWK9viExcxhevYRHBZ4ReTLf3vNedYKIzRTPqg%3D%3D)

---

Peter,

I’m running for Congress against Squad Member Ilhan Omar because it’s time for my community, my state, and our nation to get back to what made us great to begin with: **hard work and the American Dream.**

My name is Cicely Davis, and I’m fighting to bring back the Star of the North. I grew up in Minneapolis, and I remember when my city was beautiful and thriving, but thanks to Ilhan Omar and her Radical friends I barely recognize my home.

If you’re familiar with Minnesota, then you know Democrats in my state have destroyed our economy, brought violence to our streets, and exploited racial divisions to gain power. **I’m here to tell you that we can put that reign to an end.**

[** STAND WITH CICELY **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=00a91feebb8d439a9e991cca89bc8376&_e=PXZeaPUbbKeP4hM5gPYGvW5n9qMA9mf_BUwCu5scbHwZtW5sAGjWkWyTrTbGSdbSvfkP3KO0eVFx4OZRzRteD3sHcFQPI6F1wMh9im0hULnU_LV-pXDD-RX3nXrboWU2boONyUQPQ4OoL5yXEpr33IkBUPhdjPKIrHoWWbELwQws6mJv4HO0PrYwY-78GXY_6XL7pClSGdvvrzK_w5OdEX9FiOJaUvNvo0gUjUNVgeS7sOZQG9Jcw7eibsOWHgfjtja0Jxkl6S0zfWA9Kn_T9iXpvftzx6Mn3sIkLISuJsg63KJgFttebzWYlQ404VP-T6DPy3ICyvzhN-O6vV13gDn5zLFzfJzbes3jDI8E80Uf7rbGMRpl5E720FjSXc6oonunRpJHYDM5oiJnM9XqwA%3D%3D)
For too long Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. **She pressed my city of Minneapolis to defund the police,** **now it’s a breeding ground for crime where murders alone have increased 49% since last year.**

Omar has praised BLM while they set fire to our communities, she spends every waking moment bashing the very country that welcomed her, and her family with open arms and does so while enjoying more freedoms than any other nation in this world provides.

**ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. How long can we stand by and let Omar and the Democrats slowly tear our nation apart from the inside out?** [**If you’ve had enough, then it’s time to take a stand.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=00a91feebb8d439a9e991cca89bc8376&_e=PXZeaPUbbKeP4hM5gPYGvW5n9qMA9mf_BUwCu5scbHwZtW5sAGjWkWyTrTbGSdbSvfkP3KO0eVFx4OZRzRteD3sHcFQPI6F1wMh9im0hULnU_LV-pXDD-RX3nXrboWU2boONyUQPQ4OoL5yXEpr33IkBUPhdjPKIrHoWWbELwQws6mJv4HO0PrYwY-78GXY_wI9FHUXo2rSgWke6crJZLqYjgGdVfFJNpXIWq5HmYZE6m0TxKsOWTpWqJZeyU7sNtpcm1s6jghzrOG0BJUioDHRkvqvyV-zEIApsbd3s769Gg7AHpOz2n3OQRF0_6WDw7ldNd1YXvQnVTgIg5pNrF2gOS14hzoDuslPDrEW2C0cty32pc-NkiwXvCWWDHWOPRXPxisQQ0p3nGX69OtdI8g%3D%3D)

[**Peter, will you help me kick off my campaign by sending $10, $25, $50, $100 or more?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=00a91feebb8d439a9e991cca89bc8376&_e=PXZeaPUbbKeP4hM5gPYGvW5n9qMA9mf_BUwCu5scbHwZtW5sAGjWkWyTrTbGSdbSvfkP3KO0eVFx4OZRzRteD3sHcFQPI6F1wMh9im0hULnU_LV-pXDD-RX3nXrboWU2boONyUQPQ4OoL5yXEpr33IkBUPhdjPKIrHoWWbELwQws6mJv4HO0PrYwY-78GXY_6TBw4d_JCXfOLNpVDVL-RQn4X8uaOrNzrdoRlThFU3gnUdr7sb8kCEILCWWzwnsrDK87ICgokYGQ6OctrJO7-D8vyC5bsy-2T_LY5GcXLjG40Qs7rvysQPC4qOkN4N46aYMqpOIho4nthl4x91mEnP0k9EDFXqqeucFk21kFZzO7aCVda9J7ofhXaa2_rILIm6yaTt1EZxevYGONmQvf_w%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH CICELY **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=00a91feebb8d439a9e991cca89bc8376&_e=PXZeaPUbbKeP4hM5gPYGvW5n9qMA9mf_BUwCu5scbHwZtW5sAGjWkWyTrTbGSdbSvfkP3KO0eVFx4OZRzRteD3sHcFQPI6F1wMh9im0hULnU_LV-pXDD-RX3nXrboWU2boONyUQPQ4OoL5yXEpr33IkBUPhdjPKIrHoWWbELwQws6mJv4HO0PrYwY-78GXY_ysCgJoixHa6o9YwuEiJjyKvejmPPLplBUbwnZN65VzXKsyzTczFwbd7MZNodOjan-lWj_dI9W-tTDxwsLDDG4vENg127g8V7NZBtFZJFwGPC6FEOudxLmChSr6HbgXBZqmIiF_wyncWFr3hWkup1Vqit7VNIrmehU72WcdDejJsKi8Fz9s2t-OjtkNsgbVElU4Dw9aXp4OnE3Esx6nI7tw%3D%3D)
I refuse to sit by as Omar and the Democrats continue on this path of destructiveness. If you want to restore our nation then we need to take action now, even if it means reclaiming one state, one city, or even one community at time.

**I need your help to restore what made our nation so great to begin with, and it starts with places like Minneapolis. clean_body: Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. | Peter, I’m running for Congress against Squad Member Ilhan Omar because it’s time for my community, my state, and our nation to get back to what made us great to begin with: hard work and the American Dream. My name is Cicely Davis, and I’m fighting to bring back the Star of the North. I grew up in Minneapolis, and I remember when my city was beautiful and thriving, but thanks to Ilhan Omar and her Radical friends I barely recognize my home. If you’re familiar with Minnesota, then you know Democrats in my state have destroyed our economy, brought violence to our streets, and exploited racial divisions to gain power. I’m here to tell you that we can put that reign to an end. For too long Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. She pressed my city of Minneapolis to defund the police, now it’s a breeding ground for crime where murders alone have increased 49% since last year. Omar has praised BLM while they set fire to our communities, she spends every waking moment bashing the very country that welcomed her, and her family with open arms and does so while enjoying more freedoms than any other nation in this world provides. ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. How long can we stand by and let Omar and the Democrats slowly tear our nation apart from the inside out? I refuse to sit by as Omar and the Democrats continue on this path of destructiveness. If you want to restore our nation then we need to take action now, even if it means reclaiming one state, one city, or even one community at time. I need your help to restore what made our nation so great to begin with, and it starts with places like Minneapolis. This is your chance to make a real difference, For America, Cicely Davis | | PAID FOR BY CICELY DAVIS FOR CONGRESS FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: I need to fill you in on the situation, Peter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We can get back on track today if just about 1 in 8 people who read email this chips in.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210726-2090-header&t=1&akid=2090%2E434096%2Eu3YY14)
Peter,
Our team at Fetterman HQ _juuuust_ wrapped up our weekly Monday budget call, and I wanted to email you directly to fill you in on the situation:
Honestly, we're a tad bit short of where we need to be for fundraising in order to give a green light to ALL of our most urgent campaign priorities for this summer.
**John really doesn't want to have to cancel any of the big things we've got planned for this summer, so I'm hoping we can get back on track today if just about 1 in 8 people who read email this chips in.**[**_Peter, can you donate your first $5 right now to help us close the gap?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/24013?refcode=em20210726-2090&t=2&akid=2090%2E434096%2Eu3YY14)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/24013?refcode=em20210726-2090&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2090%2E434096%2Eu3YY14)**
If you chip in like $5 today, this is what your donation will immediately help fund:
✅ Organizing staff to engage volunteers and register voters
✅ Field office funding so we can reach people in all of PA's 67 counties
✅ Official campaign merch so yinz can represent your Team Fetterman pride
✅ In-person and virtual events for John and Gisele to meet and greet supporters
✅ And a lot more. I'll spare you the whole list. (Trust me, it's pretty long.)
[**_That's why I need to ask you one more time on this fine Monday, Peter: Will you chip in your first $5 or more to help make sure that NONE of our important campaign priorities get cut?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/24013?refcode=em20210726-2090&t=22&akid=2090%2E434096%2Eu3YY14)
We need to invest in all of this important work this month + next in order to elect John Fetterman to this open Senate seat in Pennsylvania.
Thanks for your help! 💙
Eric
Eric Stern
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210726-2090-footer&t=23&refcode2=2090_434096_u3YY14&akid=2090%2E434096%2Eu3YY14)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=2090%2E434096%2Eu3YY14)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2090%2E434096%2Eu3YY14)

name: John Castorani
subject: The world is on fire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
And Nancy Pelosi and her "moderate" kingmakers are the source of the division in our country.For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.johncastorani.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_s=69ef34d0b896490c8946104a6ac6fee2&_t=-ra1pPWnnp59sD3m14FQITJLHkt1xkdO64h3UtZmisUI9PNTnPhMZqQNgO-tUrdKm00k7TiShCQvlqaE_oMaFZyzxuwNoWPCunG_pAah9_kGAd3iWSNi-dmE1EEjybBZCKUaBEoZ-JA1SGGDRpD2cO2ilvIlVhDIGHLaG1MoQaM%3D) | [](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=69ef34d0b896490c8946104a6ac6fee2&_e=xwugrb5zppYnRL0LQETPPMNmhD29TOMWHQkViwf_hWTk9cYaJKbVNUNEKYbmj1lYcnUeHT_hqCi8RvwZ1yL4MHnXeSL2ol8XbNFZGh2RLecYo2g9YckJg_u0qSH-kVZ_s0AJsqoKJ1m2ybZ_dTY2545VLdrt08oDKn0wPAqeEVU4bjXNmoBI8sVWaVdPIiRyMoVuA9RmlvM_YpL4eH2EaaYieCWXo_qjpFEias7FiwdYlimFI3BfTzGc0mXYLPkBL7b3NLVg81wqBSIysLCUdPcVc4CF__BHIuyVyBJqlJ6Yytw5OA-07xasNUvNuFfFENnqbSIF-0K9JqG9ZT_sDaKxr10OMTd7yQ8OexRJeugDBFBOtIw05Pr1u-IrQMgUGACEDLjoFzr4mr9JO9-eA50UW4Mzd5dDCgknwK7eHaRimRSo0TpXxCI2wpazCoDO9WisZmRRPuhH06sER5tnUQ%3D%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

While we’re enjoying a mostly pandemic-free way of life at the moment, threats abound that aren’t related to our health – physical health that is – and they’re all emanating from a similar source: Nancy Pelosi and her House majority.

Pelosi’s hold on power is tenuous at best – but she’s ruling with an iron fist and taking no prisoners – but honestly, **who is surprised by that?** I am running for Congress because I’m discouraged by the direction of the country, and it just so happens that the district I’m running in – **VA-7—is one district Republicans have a pretty good shot at flipping.**

You see, my “moderate” opponent, Abigail Spanberger, is one of Pelosi’s chief enablers. If we’re able to take her out in the 2022 Midterm Elections, Pelosi likely loses her authority.
| [**MAKE A GIFT TODAY
HELP ME FLIP THIS SEAT** **››**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=69ef34d0b896490c8946104a6ac6fee2&_e=xwugrb5zppYnRL0LQETPPMNmhD29TOMWHQkViwf_hWTk9cYaJKbVNUNEKYbmj1lYcnUeHT_hqCi8RvwZ1yL4MHnXeSL2ol8XbNFZGh2RLecYo2g9YckJg_u0qSH-kVZ_s0AJsqoKJ1m2ybZ_dTY2545VLdrt08oDKn0wPAqeEVU4bjXNmoBI8sVWaVdPIiRyMoVuA9RmlvM_YpL4eH2EaaYieCWXo_qjpFEias7FiwdYlimFI3BfTzGc0mXYLPkBpSVEYKiChPIoFghOl7VIoGdMlh7wT8Eua7m7gtq4BC_7LnxeBIwNRscRgEdTPz_4Svv-jsmwBKL_75KVT8TbI_d-zgrRSV32T95POydemHT9cDEr7wpUQCLZ_LK5pvGCOGOq3TlwFdFghyFxfcZce0eQip5nuAILPFRqLmlyIao291QmzDACd_psY3Ru6u6gc_UibUy8mcpuscTT3XZJlw%3D%3D)
---

Think of it this way, if Republicans flip VA-07 and just four other districts with “moderate” Dems, we can:
1. Address the skyrocketing level of crime
2. Tackle the soaring cost of living
3. Fix the crisis at the southern border
4. Put an end to talks of future lockdowns
5. Ban critical race theory in schools
6. Take on Russia and China

Pelosi and the five “**moderates** ” who are playing kingmaker are standing in the way of a strong and united country.

**I’ve fought harder battles in my lifetime and won. I’m running for Congress now because I know I can win this battle, too.**.

Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable. You see, my “moderate” opponent, Abigail Spanberger, is one of Pelosi’s chief enablers. Nancy Pelosi privately admitted to her donors that her majority could fall apart because of Texas’ 2 NEW congressional seats.

---

Hoosier Republican,

This is unbelievable!

Nancy Pelosi just REJECTED Indiana Congressman Jim Banks from the newly formed January 6th select committee!

Jim Banks is a veteran and a strong conservative who has never backed down from supporting our country. Nancy Pelosi wants this committee for partisan grandstanding. Representative Banks wasn’t going to let that happen, so Nancy kicked him out.

This is a clearly partisan move on Pelosi’s part, and shows without a doubt that this commission has nothing to do with fact-finding, and everything to do with creating another political witch hunt! Why is Nancy Pelosi afraid of Jim Banks?

She’s not even trying to hide her extreme and dangerous partisanship!

We are doing everything we can to support Congressman Banks and fight to save our great republic. Please join us by chipping in a grassroots donation right now to help hold Nancy Pelosi accountable. 50% of your donation goes directly to Rep. Banks to help him fight back!

[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/6487?refcode=em20210726-287&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=287%2E3698%2E9pm9yL)
**Our average contribution is $21.54.**
One contribution of $21.54 at a time, we’re building a powerful coalition of diverse, working-class people to send a progressive champion like Erica to the Senate. [**Will you make a contribution of $21.54 to our campaign today?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/6487?refcode=em20210726-287&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=287%2E3698%2E9pm9yL)
**If you’re wondering why our average contribution is so low, it’s because Erica does NOT take a single dime from corporate PACs or the fossil fuel industry.** Instead, our campaign counts on individual small-dollar donations of $5, $10, and $21.54 to power our campaign.
**Does that make fundraising more challenging? You bet** — _especially during the summer when fundraising slows down._ But, we think relying on grassroots donors is the best way to build a people-centered campaign. It also means we need to ask for your support more often.
[**So if you can, will you make a donation of $21.54 — or any amount you’d like — to Erica Smith for U.S. Senate? It’s donations from people like you who keep our campaign for bold, progressive change running day after day.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/6487?refcode=em20210726-287&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=287%2E3698%2E9pm9yL)

Thank you so much,
Jayla
Finance Director
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

name: Cicely
subject: I’m going to Beat Ilhan Omar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CICELY DAVIS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=767148cf516c478e8465bb400292083b&_e=0zDf3I2G5BfeNJjABfSn5cx-UD7pd3RY_FgX6EsFzJU-SVkm9ZeVwyg5AoW9lNMTqx1IAB3C6rf9SdQ_xchRytlJByRdT9fUaiKRFwqxqYJx4Zp6w28O33O7DViyeM92JyMmH1yJ-CEDLofzjmLrJtCHUgVmnkVWxXaAWU5I0eXX1vwU4YTTBzJDWQUrxbRpVwa0y88iQ8JTTeWSUb_bVQ1VV5_CZ1gpX6IgzBCzrtb45i5RnlGDRElgg87JRqZFshaCkmCk1cnQSEH2zMbHAmkCszcTM8FdboJG1X1S31fAdqNGoU6LR2-tcIEBTPztM9xErH1uFSaLLbLpS57gXaTu7LeADEleYmG2cJNizXbKNCY6uLiE47Da2iNwEuWXuCd9u1y5Xy1GxZsqC5lq4A%3D%3D)

---

Fellow American,

I’m running for Congress against Squad Member Ilhan Omar because it’s time for my community, my state, and our nation to get back to what made us great to begin with: **hard work and the American Dream.**

My name is Cicely Davis, and I’m fighting to bring back the Star of the North. I grew up in Minneapolis, and I remember when my city was beautiful and thriving, but thanks to Ilhan Omar and her Radical friends I barely recognize my home.

If you’re familiar with Minnesota, then you know Democrats in my state have destroyed our economy, brought violence to our streets, and exploited racial divisions to gain power. **I’m here to tell you that we can put that reign to an end.**

[** STAND WITH CICELY **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=767148cf516c478e8465bb400292083b&_e=0zDf3I2G5BfeNJjABfSn5cx-UD7pd3RY_FgX6EsFzJU-SVkm9ZeVwyg5AoW9lNMTqx1IAB3C6rf9SdQ_xchRytlJByRdT9fUaiKRFwqxqYJx4Zp6w28O33O7DViyeM92JyMmH1yJ-CEDLofzjmLrJtCHUgVmnkVWxXaAWU5I0eVrijaIgQA5doCwVkZ9OhU9CfRxLH7x4gFtM8868jiHrJa-3jABn7-nCmBCI_Ekg8FFdQ98vHZLG_CGQ20qELY8rqfJboyVBWCLPB5S7RQuVon9a5Jx6s6vkTdCyKDivt43oSDPuoOd0JKKrAp37gVa1M5sDBbQybQrQKiOBMDMjFLtv9RL-u09NNvYi5mFH0cXk0LcqdqwLIYig6p6UVg4nse65ZMugrFmJ2CDyRISsQ%3D%3D)
For too long Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. **She pressed my city of Minneapolis to defund the police,** **now it’s a breeding ground for crime where murders alone have increased 49% since last year.**

Omar has praised BLM while they set fire to our communities, she spends every waking moment bashing the very country that welcomed her, and her family with open arms and does so while enjoying more freedoms than any other nation in this world provides.

**ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. How long can we stand by and let Omar and the Democrats slowly tear our nation apart from the inside out?** [**If you’ve had enough, then it’s time to take a stand.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=767148cf516c478e8465bb400292083b&_e=0zDf3I2G5BfeNJjABfSn5cx-UD7pd3RY_FgX6EsFzJU-SVkm9ZeVwyg5AoW9lNMTqx1IAB3C6rf9SdQ_xchRytlJByRdT9fUaiKRFwqxqYJx4Zp6w28O33O7DViyeM92JyMmH1yJ-CEDLofzjmLrJtCHUgVmnkVWxXaAWU5I0eV5WsnNtEAMOB2PMhspwgnaDwd9eo5jjQh6AE_c70qShaPgPdEA28xeFyPK6NTT0oTnd8wNO46PdrjfBckFy8XTqNw5-OtPUTnDvbTfRLywvuer0ANzpwSoPWA0ERASf7XVtqEhC2yHjz0SUF1eCMMkyleHUiScBMUgJ-qgStX9z5Gm2GQ9ZQ6zZ3uM2joEPPEPLuh2GWTd3zjVuMhVoaJZD2oNaGmlnaKwuMpfNjaPbg%3D%3D)

[**Fellow American, will you help me kick off my campaign by sending $10, $25, $50, $100 or more?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=767148cf516c478e8465bb400292083b&_e=0zDf3I2G5BfeNJjABfSn5cx-UD7pd3RY_FgX6EsFzJU-SVkm9ZeVwyg5AoW9lNMTqx1IAB3C6rf9SdQ_xchRytlJByRdT9fUaiKRFwqxqYJx4Zp6w28O33O7DViyeM92JyMmH1yJ-CEDLofzjmLrJtCHUgVmnkVWxXaAWU5I0eUA9zj7buWAHB9WUNFg_KYL9gaMJ-JozMdgXM90pwKHsRTWUA_YA1Wh16m2hQgr3_unBtCnz7t8vvJH_j11CZEA7JGqB7hG6YysBuP1Qeq-jxsBua1u5qsyF11OHcNZQaV-97sBT9VXDVxlLlDxNQJQouSVdHU7a8cPQY5Nyp70oIHRwnRxLPHm7_lbpul9qMmTci7DR_lbVayM7dvwX095JVBxy9iqIYDdxPKmmpevfQ%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH CICELY **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=767148cf516c478e8465bb400292083b&_e=0zDf3I2G5BfeNJjABfSn5cx-UD7pd3RY_FgX6EsFzJU-SVkm9ZeVwyg5AoW9lNMTqx1IAB3C6rf9SdQ_xchRytlJByRdT9fUaiKRFwqxqYJx4Zp6w28O33O7DViyeM92JyMmH1yJ-CEDLofzjmLrJtCHUgVmnkVWxXaAWU5I0eXh_DaOOupmWSzFiLObQIpzo7bUI20Npfm4rDzlfryOIyA83tusZKewiZ6XP8gZc6GHjE7VUP8DxB7M2-s_NiIvhzW9mUkQgW1ZB2TwktWRr_LWjyNIiXCO4V17Rp9YnQGZpYEg2ppU4VlEdNc6Vd2Yzw0HagHrLPShRu0Tgfr5vKMXPdXiv31btxq3QA0zNUgZSNzDHepFxzXsjBeiplHS6sOmnkVLwQ8CWkaqYiDmgA%3D%3D)
I refuse to sit by as Omar and the Democrats continue on this path of destructiveness. If you want to restore our nation then we need to take action now, even if it means reclaiming one state, one city, or even one community at time.

**I need your help to restore what made our nation so great to begin with, and it starts with places like Minneapolis. clean_body: Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. | Fellow American, I’m running for Congress against Squad Member Ilhan Omar because it’s time for my community, my state, and our nation to get back to what made us great to begin with: hard work and the American Dream. My name is Cicely Davis, and I’m fighting to bring back the Star of the North. I grew up in Minneapolis, and I remember when my city was beautiful and thriving, but thanks to Ilhan Omar and her Radical friends I barely recognize my home. If you’re familiar with Minnesota, then you know Democrats in my state have destroyed our economy, brought violence to our streets, and exploited racial divisions to gain power. I’m here to tell you that we can put that reign to an end. For too long Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. She pressed my city of Minneapolis to defund the police, now it’s a breeding ground for crime where murders alone have increased 49% since last year. Omar has praised BLM while they set fire to our communities, she spends every waking moment bashing the very country that welcomed her, and her family with open arms and does so while enjoying more freedoms than any other nation in this world provides. ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. How long can we stand by and let Omar and the Democrats slowly tear our nation apart from the inside out? I refuse to sit by as Omar and the Democrats continue on this path of destructiveness. If you want to restore our nation then we need to take action now, even if it means reclaiming one state, one city, or even one community at time. I need your help to restore what made our nation so great to begin with, and it starts with places like Minneapolis. This is your chance to make a real difference, For America, Cicely Davis | | PAID FOR BY CICELY DAVIS FOR CONGRESS FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? This is a major setback for the Nevada Democrats, but we’re still up against an intrenched incumbent with millions flowing in from radical Leftist out-of-state megadonors. It’s clear my background as a decorated Veteran of the War in Afghanistan and our message of hope and resilience is resonating with Nevada voters. Even liberal Political experts know we have the winning message in this race! to help us get our winning message to every single Nevada voter! This announcement has put Chuck Schumer and ever Democrat megadonor in the Country on notice about our race. Millions are about to flood in to tear me down and salvage this seat. I faced down terrorist and Taliban fighters in Afghanistan, I’ll never back down from a fight. But I’m only as good as the team behind me. In liberty, Capt. Sam Brown | | Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada Military references and photos do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any Service Branch. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: They say "No Fraud" - We say #ProveIt
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
The Audit did it's job |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3f4113df5e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
I am on a mission and I have been on the MOVE!

**The word is out about the Arizona Audit and I have a duty to share it.**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3cd1eff04f&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _My name is Mark Finchem. I am the first guy who took a stand and said NO; I listened to you when so many others could not be bothered. I led a team of courageous legislators who joined me in the very first hearing that launched a nationwide phenomenon._

I am a former policeman, paramedic, firefighter, and leader in the Arizona business community. And now I am driven by a critical mission.

**We are running a historic race for Secretary of State in Arizona based on one fundamental principle:**

We need to protect our elections!
***Join the Movement***
Yes, it’s that simple. When the Democrats can steal any election they want to from Republicans, what else really matters?

**But we will continue to fight in this war on your behalf. And the cause is spreading...**

There are at least nine states now that need or want to have a forensic audit.

People are awake and people want to know. People are now cognizant to the fact that the elections are the people’s elections, and the people have a right to make sure that their elections are secure.

**Short of that, there is no way to prevent authoritarian regimes from rising to power. And we cannot allow that.** [I need your help](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a03d0f3cb0&e=44b8c466b0)!
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a9309e20cd&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **#ProveIt**
After constant scrutiny and attacks by the Fake News Media, what have we accomplished?
* We have shown that 168,000 on-demand ballots are suspect.
* There were 74,000 more ballots received than ballots sent out.
* Thousands of voter names were added AFTER election day!
* Bleed-through indicates it is highly likely that at least a portion of Republican voters were given sharpies to vote on election day.

**And our fight is just beginning!**

This is why Proud Patriots around the country need to adopt a new slogan.

**_PROVE IT!_**

We have shown that there are irregularities. We have shown that there are literally more votes than are legally possible. We have shown that tens if not hundreds of thousands of votes are in question when only a fraction of that would be needed to overturn the results in Arizona.

**Well Fake News Media and the Democrats who stole our election while claiming it was the most free and fair of all time...**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0321c2592c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **_PROVE IT!_**

Prove there was no fraud in the election. Prove that the machines can’t access the internet. Prove that the votes weren’t changed. Prove that the 3 AM vote dumps were legitimate!

**We have put in the financial investment, the blood, the sweat, and the tears.**

The Left has resorted to phony legal attacks and name calling.

**Let’s put them on the spot. Let’s have them Prove it.**

[_Donate Today as much as you can and join the Prove-It movement!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c23ec3baa1&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Friends and Patriots, we are standing at a historic moment in American History. Our country has been stolen from us but we have a short window to take it back.

**Our team has put in the legwork. We have the data. We know the statistics. **

**_Now we just need Patriots like you to spread the message and create a wave that the Radical Leftists ruining our country can’t ignore._**

And all it takes is a small donation today to join our movement or a big donation to kick our movement into the next gear!

[_Help us today with a strong donation to send a message to the Left that they need to prove the election was legitimate, when we all know it wasn’t!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2a5e259072&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=eed4f9494b&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4ca3fbc657&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=66e87733d1) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=66e87733d1).
---

name: George Logan
subject: This is my why.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GEORGE LOGAN
body:
| [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=85f338f8a3184243847c2e5783036453&_e=tuBkmsVLqQQA58PINLk4vwaSJlb-02BH8ILjHv0G4KAM1MLA38rpX0YOxN9E26owC1lAIBauqA2RE5KS9lrX6G2JS2FSRnf6TtzXR9ZBdubzUGAVEGQts4-lmDfVtXMox5_WdyKtE-2N6bamgDxkuqHuJa-vxPER3mSHo7DMK0wc6ddE-auw4hLDU-rmM0mN-Y7G0E9ozkA-PZ00_ObI-jY9O8TINIERrOOWtW2uUb-ZfL3T_5Lb-XoyoX7J39PDVuqf1rbDo54oy_yjbHjmICLV5Op2VAGMzQWLOYJhlYzCEJ_RasuFSoviFs439WLQPrbOTD2NxjmK-jhjGQVaE7xi_pLD9Pt2LjWFH8QHMBdtdveWB6edzZluBv6JFW-TMA2b3OoyqJhoI2i930qF44ZhJNGtM-f0VrgcRZWfeCZ2w2HEVmCpZC0U5DwTiJdrrUAmVKjWcFYB8cUsVFsS_KMR87RVYjkO-iQS-T2lBHc9rqvqnihUDD6CowXkBdOqDcviGz6GD-uobjasIrIgp3gMVfn4NHZfJbKLn2cqmCQ%3D)

---
Fellow American, I would like to take a moment to introduce myself. My name is George Logan, and I am running for Congress.

We're all running around with our daily lives so voters tend not to know their representatives, so I thought I would share some personal factoids with you:

* I am a first-generation African American and Black Hispanic Republican
* I earned my bachelor's degree in engineering from Trinity College
* I served two terms in the Connecticut State Senate
* I play the guitar and volunteer my free time at the YMCA and as a youth mentor

As an engineer and a community leader, I have spent my entire life trying and succeeding at finding ways to solve problems - both big and small. But now, I am ready to solve the national issues that affect **_your_** daily life.

Being a first-generation Hispanic and African American, people assume that I must be a Democrat - _but that could not be farther from the truth._ **So , let me make it clear: I am a proud Afro-Latino Republican**, ready to fight the power grab from out of touch radical politicians and serve the great people of this nation.

**Fellow American , I am living proof that the American dream is still alive.** And I'm running for Congress because that dream can't end with me. I want my children and future generations to have the opportunity to reach their full potential in life. [**If you 're ready to lead the charge for a new direction for our great nation and are eager for a better future, please sign my official pledge of support today!**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=85f338f8a3184243847c2e5783036453&_e=tuBkmsVLqQQA58PINLk4vwaSJlb-02BH8ILjHv0G4KAM1MLA38rpX0YOxN9E26owC1lAIBauqA2RE5KS9lrX6G2JS2FSRnf6TtzXR9ZBdubzUGAVEGQts4-lmDfVtXMox5_WdyKtE-2N6bamgDxkuqHuJa-vxPER3mSHo7DMK0wc6ddE-auw4hLDU-rmM0mN-Y7G0E9ozkA-PZ00_ObI-jY9O8TINIERrOOWtW2uUb-ZfL3T_5Lb-XoyoX7J39PDVuqf1rbDo54oy_yjbHjmICLV5Op2VAGMzQWLOYJhlYzCEJ_RasuFSoviFs439WLQPrbOTD2NxjmK-jhjGQVaE8t3ww9RCy2K40vWC-3cAAEaH8N0ztBB9BCaAX9BXoa21CJWJ6UDdNi9fNd7z_N8JGbK0JKVexFm9TZGRlCHzoQ6AOboprVdPbFYnu4_7D9dvqw5NRkvciLXvtmQtqNInzw2ldZJO1BkZyf6gEt1Lmw3kV98qv9Y6GMmt3Ir5WG-dXC3w60E60VApAtP3T0MYhNmGtym8fduhwMmmDsmaA8%3D)

| **[George Logan's Official Pledge of Support](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=85f338f8a3184243847c2e5783036453&_e=tuBkmsVLqQQA58PINLk4vwaSJlb-02BH8ILjHv0G4KAM1MLA38rpX0YOxN9E26owC1lAIBauqA2RE5KS9lrX6G2JS2FSRnf6TtzXR9ZBdubzUGAVEGQts4-lmDfVtXMox5_WdyKtE-2N6bamgDxkuqHuJa-vxPER3mSHo7DMK0wc6ddE-auw4hLDU-rmM0mN-Y7G0E9ozkA-PZ00_ObI-jY9O8TINIERrOOWtW2uUb-ZfL3T_5Lb-XoyoX7J39PDVuqf1rbDo54oy_yjbHjmICLV5Op2VAGMzQWLOYJhlYzCEJ_RasuFSoviFs439WLQPrbOTD2NxjmK-jhjGQVaE86GHFB_H-hGfA1YSSyXwWWzr8W9_W2PW6HCojdz0gvGbDiU4gZIz9VFUlERtd22Pabj_fz7_RAOq7R0Iq3mc3w37WZL2pJkGACdh-i8jhMkX8um21COmc4vGyuq_Bc0vI9gXmfseO_StfB5WkRTJrtG5KJZGHoD_0deu6KPWSc_2Y3rsQQfmUfelYgOZXaWrrhONG3U-gvZV66eOCnO9f0%3D)**

[**_ADD NAME_**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=85f338f8a3184243847c2e5783036453&_e=tuBkmsVLqQQA58PINLk4vwaSJlb-02BH8ILjHv0G4KAM1MLA38rpX0YOxN9E26owC1lAIBauqA2RE5KS9lrX6G2JS2FSRnf6TtzXR9ZBdubzUGAVEGQts4-lmDfVtXMox5_WdyKtE-2N6bamgDxkuqHuJa-vxPER3mSHo7DMK0wc6ddE-auw4hLDU-rmM0mN-Y7G0E9ozkA-PZ00_ObI-jY9O8TINIERrOOWtW2uUb-ZfL3T_5Lb-XoyoX7J39PDVuqf1rbDo54oy_yjbHjmICLV5Op2VAGMzQWLOYJhlYzCEJ_RasuFSoviFs439WLQPrbOTD2NxjmK-jhjGQVaE9yOo3Q-RfPlEYxaI7-wVakZYlIU1B9NkBphEJpYJGPtqs6YPZHUckq04_yhTTPuOwQ3CXA7VE0LKT_xcK159fE0w-OiaTGhHzDB7XbKng0-g1F-TcEk5-UeyM9vHXyjNgB0nnyzyq81QXc6E4rfGtzMb4IsXaP6hbNXOyeSLZEhknzmurFZWdjyI493WopLxRxlin7cVZcB8MS14iz8H1Q%3D)

Democrats in Washington D.C. are fighting for a radical agenda - but that is not a place anyone should ever live. Their misguided policies and lack of true leadership will turn us into a socialist society.

Fellow American, we are facing a CRITICAL choice about the kind of Representatives we send to Washington... and we cannot afford to get this one wrong! clean_body: | Fellow American, I would like to take a moment to introduce myself. My name is George Logan, and I am running for Congress. We're all running around with our daily lives so voters tend not to know their representatives, so I thought I would share some personal factoids with you: I am a first-generation African American and Black Hispanic Republican I earned my bachelor's degree in engineering from Trinity College I served two terms in the Connecticut State Senate I play the guitar and volunteer my free time at the YMCA and as a youth mentor As an engineer and a community leader, I have spent my entire life trying and succeeding at finding ways to solve problems - both big and small. But now, I am ready to solve the national issues that affect your daily life. Being a first-generation Hispanic and African American, people assume that I must be a Democrat - but that could not be farther from the truth. So , let me make it clear: I am a proud Afro-Latino Republican, ready to fight the power grab from out of touch radical politicians and serve the great people of this nation. Fellow American , I am living proof that the American dream is still alive. And I'm running for Congress because that dream can't end with me. I want my children and future generations to have the opportunity to reach their full potential in life. | Democrats in Washington D.C. are fighting for a radical agenda - but that is not a place anyone should ever live. Their misguided policies and lack of true leadership will turn us into a socialist society. Fellow American, we are facing a CRITICAL choice about the kind of Representatives we send to Washington... and we cannot afford to get this one wrong! The National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) is predicting 5 vulnerable seats in the Northeast - and the seat I am running for is one of them. I’ve got some bad news. Democrats spent millions of dollars to try and take down Nicole Malliotakis last year, and we’re hearing reports that Nancy Pelosi’s campaign machine is gearing up to do the exact same thing in 2022.

**We cannot let that happen.**

name: Rick Scott
subject: Your gift = 5x-matched
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
See for yourself → | Peter,

This will only take a minute.

**Your support is critical to the success of the Republican Party.** Whenever we’ve needed you the most, you never fail to step up, which is why I’m coming to you now with an urgent request.

clean_body: Can we add your name to the list? | Human smugglers are aggressively using Facebook to exploit Biden’s border crisis - and largely getting away with it. Friend, Did you see our last email?Big Tech censorship is getting even worse. Human smugglers are aggressively using Facebook to exploit Biden's border crisis - and largely getting away with it. Instead of focusing so much on censoring conservatives, likePRESIDENT TRUMP , Big Tech should work to stop real threats like these. It is clear that Big Tech is more concerned with banning the 45th President of the United States andsilencing conservatives than it is with stopping human smugglers and violent criminals. We need to pressure them to STOP this abuse of power. For a short time, we are reaching out to our TOP Patriots, like YOU, to ask that you join us in combating Big Tech and DEMANDING freedom of speech for all Americans. We know you have always been an avid supporter of protecting our rights, which is why we knew we could rely on you, Friend. Can we count on you to join us? ********** ****SUPPORTER: Friend CONTRIBUTION STATUS:****PENDING DEADLINE: 1 HOUR**** Conservative censorship is only getting worse. name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: We know commies in Florida
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
AOC is no different from Castro |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=c0c9993b9b&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

Florida is the beacon of freedom and hope for the world right now.

Even as Biden drags the rest of the country into an inflation-induced malaise like Carter did, Florida is providing hope that freedom and America First policies provide hope for a brighter future than AOC, Biden and the Communist Dems.

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=696232adfc&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District in Orlando. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, who sides with AOC and her support for Communist Cuba, while really sticking it to Florida families. **

Soto campaigns as a moderate, but in reality he *hearts* AOC.

Here in Florida, we know Communist Cuba rather well. Millions of former Cubans fled Communism to come to Florida.

So when Cuba erupted in protest against the dictatorial Communist regime in Cuba, Floridians rose to support them. How could we not? _We saw better than anyone what Communism did to these people and their families._

**That is why I was infuriated when I saw AOC sticking up for Communist Cuba. Yup, it's true!**

_New York Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez says she is concerned that Republicans are laying the "groundwork for regime change" in Cuba.

Ocasio-Cortez was asked for her response to GOP lawmakers who have said the protests for freedom in Cuba are evidence that socialism and communism are flawed economic systems.

Ocasio-Cortez responded to members of her party arguing that the economic problems in Cuba, which is led by a communist regime, are about much more than sanctions.

"This issue is, it's not just one facet, but where the U.S. has historically been the most aggressive in and where, we, you know, in bringing up the embargo you're pointing to the U.S. role and U.S. actions because if you leave that gaping opening, my concern is that people are trying to lay the groundwork for regime change," Ocasio-Cortez said._

**So, Cuban Communist shock troopers are gunning down freedom protesters in the streets of Havana, but AOC thinks we need to defend the Cuban regime and lift sanctions on it?!?**

AOC is the typical out of touch modern Democrat: self-absorbed, historically ignorant, and Communist through and through.

Sadly, she's not alone.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a46d3e287b&e=afa21b7626)
---
| __**Washington, DC Mayor Bowser, a Democrat, actually ordered city workers to remove "Cuba Libre" from the street outside the Cuban Embassy!**__

_Washington, D.C., Mayor Muriel Bowser’s administration has removed a slogan painted in front of the Cuban embassy supporting the Cuban protesters who have taken to the streets to oppose the country’s communist regime.

The message showed up on Friday and contained the phrase "Cuba Libre," which translates to "Free Cuba" and has often been used, especially on social media, to support the Cuban people who are currently clashing with Cuba’s government._

**And all this time, Darren Soto has NOT condemned wither AOC or Mayor Bowser. He doesn't stand with the free people of Cuba; he stands with the Communists!**

Florida Governor DeSantis knows better. He's not letting this be about "vaccines", as Biden claimed; or about sanctions. He knows it's a struggle against Communism, and that's what we have here in the U.S. as well!

_Governor Ron DeSantis who recently signed legislation into law that will mandate the teaching of the “evils of communism” in countries like Cuba in Florida schools says, “Florida supports the people of Cuba as they take to the streets against the tyrannical regime in Havana.”

“The Cuban dictatorship has repressed the people of Cuba for decades & is now trying to silence those who have the courage to speak out against its disastrous policies.”_

_[Help me get to Congress](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=9ef5caf8ae&e=afa21b7626), and I'll aggressively push the America First agenda. I'll mandate the teaching of the evils of Communism like Gov. DeSantis did. And I'll help the free people of Cuba by extending internet and cell service to the island so the protesters won't be shut down by Cuba's dictator!_

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Darren Soto. _He is a spineless career politician who wants NO PART of going up against me again!_

**He can't even condemn Communism, either here or abroad; I will fight for our freedoms, like Gov. DeSantis has done here in Florida!**

I won't back down, because [this is the year to take it back!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=63461be34f&e=afa21b7626) I'm fired up to go to DC and stand up to AOC and Marxism. [If you are too, then join me](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=5ebeece07b&e=afa21b7626)!

The Dems must go! [Help me fight Communism here in America!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=6f31929edf&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ef125ca4da&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=aa0874c6d5&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=17a6031f63&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
